DP.549.0000:
Forget it!
This isn’t over yet!
DP.549.0001:
My Pokémon’s HP is low...
This could be a bit tight.
DP.549.0002:
What’s going on here?
What, I lost?!
DP.549.0003:
Think you can take down the 
next Pokémon like you did earlier?
DP.549.0004:
No way! Not yet!
Not giving up!
DP.549.0005:
W-what? That can’t be!
My buffed-up Pokémon!
DP.549.0006:
You avoided the long way around?
Let’s see why you’d do that!\f
DP.549.0007:
Now I understand why you decided to
battle with me.
DP.549.0008:
You should go whichever way you
want, shortcut or the long way!
DP.549.0009:
Only those who want to win can
challenge a Pokémon Gym!\f
DP.549.0011:
One day, I’m going to become a tough
Trainer like you.
DP.549.0012:
You’re a Pokémon Trainer!
I happen to be a Pokémon Trainer!\f
Our eyes met, so battle we must!\f
DP.549.0014:
Don’t be shy about talking to
Trainers you’d like to battle.\f
Pokémon grow stronger and stronger
from battling.
DP.549.0015:
Did you get better since we met?
I... Well, here, just look!\f
DP.549.0016:
Let’s have a Pokémon battle!
Humph! But I’m gonna win!\f
DP.549.0018:
It’s fun to battle others!
I’m gonna battle all sorts of people!
DP.549.0019:
Let’s have another Pokémon battle!
This time, I’m gonna win!\f
DP.549.0020:
I spy, with my little eye...
A Trainer!\f
A battle, please!\f
DP.549.0022:
My Pokémon are all tuckered out!
I need to go to a Poké Center!
DP.549.0023:
Oh, hi!
I remember you, Trainer!\f
A battle, please!\f
DP.549.0024:
I’m full of energy because I get
power from my Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0025: Oh! My poor BIDOOF and ZUBAT!
DP.549.0026:
Avoid tall grass...
Or avoid Trainers...\r
Do you have trouble deciding?
DP.549.0027:
You look familiar, Trainer.
Can I have another match?\f
DP.549.0028:
We’re always together.
I’ll show you how we’ve bonded!\f
DP.549.0030:
I don’t bear grudges over losing.
But I promise I’ll get tougher!
DP.549.0031:
I’m always with my Pokémon.\f
Actually, you’re always with your
Pokémon too, aren’t you?\f
DP.549.0032:
Gimme a battle so I can see if I’m
ready for the Pokémon Gym challenge!\f
DP.549.0033:
I guess it means I’m not ready for
the Gym challenge yet...
DP.549.0034:
I guess if you don’t have a single
Gym Badge, you’re a total nobody...
DP.549.0035:
I’m about to take the Pokémon Gym
challenge.\f
But before I go, I wanna spar with
you.\f
DP.549.0036:
I got a nifty-keen Gym Badge from
the Gym Leader in Oreburgh City!\f
DP.549.0038:
I’m going to collect lots of Gym
Badges! I’ll work with my Pokémon!
DP.549.0039:
I got a nifty-keen Gym Badge from
the Gym Leader in Oreburgh City!\f
...Did I show you already?\f
DP.549.0040:
I found a Trainer while looking for
some Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0042:
I walk through tall grass until I
find the Pokémon I want.
DP.549.0044:
Oh, a weak-looking Trainer...
Do you want to have a go?\f
DP.549.0045:
Aww...
I should have said no.
DP.549.0046:
I didn’t know you’re so tough...
I’m going to train harder too!
DP.549.0047:
Hi, pretty-tough Trainer!
Will you give me a rematch?\f
DP.549.0048:
My dad gave me some Pokémon!
They’re gonna win for me!\f
DP.549.0049:
But they’re Pokémon I got from my
dad...
DP.549.0050:
Who gave you your first Pokémon?\f
Your first Pokémon is the one with
the most fond memories, I think.
DP.549.0051:
I’m gonna win this time with the
Pokémon I got from my dad!\f
DP.549.0052:
May I please trouble you for a
battle?\f
DP.549.0054:
Maybe I could have won if my Pokémon
was holding a Berry...
DP.549.0055:
Oh, thank you for the last time.\f
May I please trouble you for
another battle?\f
DP.549.0056:
Say, listen. What’s your opinion on
bug Pokémon?\f
DP.549.0057:
I’m not going to be able to explain
the charms of bug Pokémon this way!
DP.549.0058:
Bug Pokémon grow quickly, and they do
stuff like poison and paralyze, and\r
they’re cute and yet cool.\f
You gotta believe me. They’re good!
DP.549.0059:
So, listen. Tell me you’ve grown to
like bug Pokémon since we last met?\f
DP.549.0060:
Let’s have a battle while smelling
the aroma of flowers!\f
DP.549.0061:
Even though I lost, I’m not angry
because it smells so nice.
DP.549.0062:
Maybe I’ll put some Accessories on
my Pokémon at the TV station in\r
Jubilife City.
DP.549.0063:
You came back to me because you
couldn’t forget the smell of flowers!\f
DP.549.0064:
Liv: We can one-shot this Trainer,
can’t we, Liz?\f
DP.549.0066: Liv: Awww! That is so bad!
DP.549.0067:
Liv: You only have one Pokémon?
That’s so boring!
DP.549.0068:
Liv: Oh! You’re that Trainer!
Let’s get payback, Liz!\f
DP.549.0069:
Liz: We’re the strongest in our
class!\f
DP.549.0071:
Liz: I wish I could be strong like
you when I get bigger.
DP.549.0072:
Liz: Um, will you battle with us?
Me and Liv?
DP.549.0073:
Liz: We’re the best in our class.
We can’t be losers all the time!\f
DP.549.0074:
How about a quick battle before
I leave for Eterna Forest?\f
DP.549.0076:
They say there are rough Pokémon
in Eterna Forest.\f
I’d better be more prepared than
this.
DP.549.0077:
You’ve been to Eterna Forest
already, right? How was it?\f
DP.549.0078:
It’s a long way between Floaroma
and Eterna City. So, let’s battle!\f
DP.549.0079:
Wawawaah!
I’m out of Pokémon that can go!
DP.549.0080:
With my Pokémon by my side, I’m
sure any camping will be a blast!
DP.549.0081:
While I was enjoying camping, my
Pokémon got all buffed up!\f
DP.549.0082:
What kinds of Pokémon live around
here, I wonder?\f
DP.549.0083:
I’m shocked!
How did I lose?
DP.549.0084:
What can I tell you about Pokémon?\f
Well, there are males and females.
And some that you can’t tell!
DP.549.0085:
Oh, hi! We meet again!
Have you seen any rare Pokémon?\f
DP.549.0086:
Oh, I don’t know.
Should I play a little?\f
DP.549.0088:
Listen very closely...
Can you hear the cries of Pokémon?
DP.549.0089:
Oh, I don’t know.
Should I play a little again?\f
DP.549.0090:
There’s no mountain here, but I’m
dressed to hike! Gahaha! Here goes!\f
DP.549.0091:
Oh, yeah!
A refreshing battle that was!
DP.549.0092:
You can find the same kinds of
Pokémon in all sorts of places.\f
There’s no law saying a Hiker can’t
go searching off in the mountains!
DP.549.0093:
If you meet someone in the mountains,
they’re no longer strangers.\f
Meet them twice, and they’re your
friend!\f
DP.549.0094:
Of all places possible, I’ve lost
my way here...\f
DP.549.0095:
Having lost his way, the Trainer lost
the battle too...
DP.549.0096:
From being lost in the mountains so
long, I became a Hiker...
DP.549.0097:
I’ve lost my way again... I’m
betrayed by my sense of direction.\f
DP.549.0098:
Osu!
I’m not trained to hold back!\f
DP.549.0099:
I... I concede!
You’re in a different class...
DP.549.0100:
You taught me how I measure up!
Thank you!
DP.549.0101:
Osu!
This time, I’m fully committed!\f
DP.549.0102:
I love Pokémon that smell sweet.
Like this one--get a whiff of this!\f
DP.549.0103:
Did you understand what I meant?
Didn’t my Pokémon smell nice?
DP.549.0104:
If you plant lots of Berries, you
can be surrounded by sweet scents.
DP.549.0105:
Sniff... Oh?
Your Pokémon smells nice!\f
DP.549.0106:
Nothing’s biting...
I could use a break, I suppose.\f
DP.549.0107:
Oh, well. I should’ve been a little
more serious about this.
DP.549.0108:
!\f
Yank your fishing rod when that
appears. That’s how you fish.
DP.549.0109:
All right! I caught some tough
Pokémon. I’m ready for battle!\f
DP.549.0110:
I landed myself a feisty Trainer!
Let’s go!\f
DP.549.0111: I let a big win slip away...
DP.549.0112:
Do you have a fishing rod?
Catch some big ones!
DP.549.0113:
Hey, you feisty tyke! I caught a big
one! Let’s battle again!\f
DP.549.0114:
I fished up some tough Pokémon!
Let’s have ourselves a battle!\f
DP.549.0115:
Losing has my emotions all knotted
up!
DP.549.0116:
My feet are tangled, too!
Ouch! Ouch!
DP.549.0117:
I’m going to win this time!
I said I’ll win, and I mean it!\f
DP.549.0118:
Yo!
Having a good time cycling?\f
DP.549.0120:
Cycling Road’s teeming with
Pokémon Trainers, too!
DP.549.0121:
I’m sure I’ve seen your face before.
Did we maybe battle?\f
DP.549.0122:
Hey! Watch where you’re going!
Or did you want to challenge me?\f
DP.549.0124:
I might try racing through Cycling
Road in one long shot.
DP.549.0125:
There you are!\f
I’ve been riding in this spot so I’d
get a rematch with you!\f
DP.549.0126:
Your Bike is the type that can shift
gears, huh?\f
Let me see if you know how to ride
it properly.\f
DP.549.0128:
Huh? I was supposed to be checking
if you know how to shift gears.\r
Why am I checking out your Pokémon?
DP.549.0129:
Let me see if you’ve learned how to
ride your Bike properly.\r
I’ll check you out again!\f
DP.549.0130:
A Bicycle can only take you as far as
your energy will allow.\f
DP.549.0132:
My Pokémon are out of gas.
So am I.\f
I’m going to head home soon...
DP.549.0133:
I got plenty of rest at home.
I’m not losing this time!\f
DP.549.0134:
I worked up a good sweat riding!
I’m feeling great! Let’s battle!\f
DP.549.0136:
Do you find yourself pedaling
backward going downhill?
DP.549.0137:
I worked up a good sweat riding!
I feel ready for a rematch!\f
DP.549.0138:
You and I, we’re both riding
Bikes.\f
And you’ve got Pokémon.
I don’t want to lose to you!\f
DP.549.0139:
Oh, geez...
I seem to have fallen off my Bike.
DP.549.0140:
Instead of a battle, I should’ve
challenged you to a Bike race!
DP.549.0141:
I hate knowing you’ve beaten me.
This time, I’m going to win!\f
DP.549.0142:
I love my Bike!\f
But I’m not very good at fixing flat
tires...\f
DP.549.0144:
I admire people who understand
gadgets.\f
I’m clueless about how my Pokétch
works.
DP.549.0145:
I want to practice repairing flat
tires...\f
But I’ve been practicing with my
Pokémon to get our revenge!\f
DP.549.0146:
Some people compete over speed, and
some compete over technique.\f
Which kind are you?\f
DP.549.0148:
I enjoy the scenery.\f
Don’t you think the area below
Cycling Road looks nice?
DP.549.0149:
I polished up both my speed and
techniques. Can you beat me now?\f
DP.549.0150:
Whoa! You startled me!
Well, we may as well battle!\f
DP.549.0152:
We Hikers are bighearted guys!
Losing doesn’t bother us!
DP.549.0153:
Whoa! You startled me!
We may as well have a rematch!\f
DP.549.0154:
I wear shorts the whole year!
I’ve got energy to burn!\f
DP.549.0155:
Having lots of energy isn’t good
enough...
DP.549.0156:
My Pokémon don’t wear anything.
I worry that they’ll be cold.
DP.549.0157:
I wear shorts! I have lots of
energy! I’m not losing to you!\f
DP.549.0158:
Go for it, my Pokémon!
I’ll do my best, too!\f
DP.549.0160:
Did you know? You can dig up Fossils
in the Underground!\f
Those Fossils can be turned back into
Pokémon at the mining museum!
DP.549.0161:
Go for it, my Pokémon!
I’ll do more than my best this time!\f
DP.549.0162:
Go do it, my Pokémon!
I’ll work hard, too!\f
DP.549.0164:
I think we’ll go visit the TV station
in Jubilife City next.
DP.549.0165:
Ummm... You’re the Trainer who beat
us before, aren’t you?\f
We’re feeling good today, so let’s
have another battle!\f
DP.549.0167:
Wahahaha! There’s nothing that
I can do but laugh!
DP.549.0168:
Wahaha!
...Go ahead and laugh at me.
DP.549.0169:
Wahaha!\f
Laughter brings good fortune!
Forgetting your gloves brings a cold!\f
DP.549.0170:
I just got through Mt. Coronet, but
we’ve still got fuel in the tank!\f
DP.549.0171:
Whoops!
Didn’t take much to beat us!
DP.549.0172:
We need to rest up in Oreburgh City
before heading to Mt. Coronet again.
DP.549.0173:
I just got through Mt. Coronet,
and who do I see?\f
A Trainer who we’ve battled before!\f
DP.549.0174:
OK, OK!
Let’s be quick about this!\f
DP.549.0175:
No way! Give us another battle!
...Oh, right. I’m out of Pokémon.
DP.549.0176:
Yup!
I like the way you battle.
DP.549.0177:
What took you so long?
We’ve waited here a long time for\r
a rematch with you!\f
DP.549.0178:
Gahahaha! You’re just a little kid!\f
How’re you supposed to beat a big
man like me?\f
DP.549.0179:
I’m a grown-up, but I got served by
some little kid!
DP.549.0180:
Wow, you’re sure impressive!\f
I guess it makes no difference if
you’re young or old in battles.
DP.549.0181:
Hey, you, tough little kid!
Throw us a rematch, will you?\f
DP.549.0182:
They call me The Echo Man!
Battle with me! Yahoo!\f
DP.549.0184:
Let The Echo Man give you a good word
of advice!\f
If you don’t know where you should
be going, check the Town Map.
DP.549.0185:
Oh, hi there! Remember us?
I’m The Echo Man!\f
Let’s have another battle!
Yahoo!\f
DP.549.0186:
If I beat you, will you share some
food with me?\f
DP.549.0187:
We were starved for food, and now
we’re starved for a win...
DP.549.0188:
Sigh... I feel even hungrier...
Maybe I’ll chow down some Berries...\f
But that’s kind of gross.
What am I, a Pokémon?
DP.549.0189:
I, uh, chowed down my packed lunch
before we started climbing.\f
If I beat you this time, share some
food with me!\f
DP.549.0190: This karate man will pulverize you!\f
DP.549.0192:
I need to work out more.
My Pokémon do, too!
DP.549.0193:
This karate man hasn’t forgotten
being pulverized by you!\f
DP.549.0194:
Muhihi...
I’ll haul you up and out!\f
DP.549.0195:
My favorite word is restraint.
Especially in battle.
DP.549.0196:
You need a Good Rod if you want to
catch good Pokémon.
DP.549.0197:
Muhihi... There won’t be any
restraint this time, OK?\f
DP.549.0198:
Oh, you want to have a battle?\f
I was meaning to enter a Contest,
but beating you won’t take long...\f
DP.549.0200:
You and your Pokémon have so much
energy.\f
I think you would do well in
Contests, too.
DP.549.0201:
Oh, didn’t we meet before?\f
I was meaning to enter a Contest,
but let’s have a quick battle first.\f
DP.549.0202:
You and I!\f
Let us create a scene!
A fantastic tableau of battle!\f
DP.549.0203:
Magnificent!
I am aglow with inspiration!
DP.549.0204:
That battle will surely become a
stupendous masterpiece painting!\f
I shall title it...\f
“My Pokémon Is Fight”!
DP.549.0205:
The key to becoming a good painter
is to be observant.\f
That is the same for battling.
One must be observant!\f
DP.549.0206:
Let me see how much you’ve raised
your Pokémon.\f
DP.549.0207:
Good stuff! Your Pokémon are in
impeccable condition.
DP.549.0208:
It’s obvious you raise your Pokémon
with a lot of love.
DP.549.0209:
I’ve raised my Pokémon since we met.
How much have you raised yours?\f
DP.549.0210:
Listen, if you don’t mind, I’d like to
have a battle with your Pokémon.\f
DP.549.0211:
Giggle...
They’re raised with a lot of care!
DP.549.0212:
If you treat your Pokémon with care,
they’ll reward you with friendship\r
and loyalty.
DP.549.0213:
I don’t want to ever battle with
people who don’t treat Pokémon nice!\f
But I know you treat yours kindly.
I’ll battle you anytime!\f
DP.549.0214:
Hi, there! Where’re you from?
What kinds of Pokémon have you got?\f
DP.549.0215:
Fancy folks like you have fancy
Pokémon too, it looks like.
DP.549.0216:
I hope my pa didn’t spy me slacking
off from work here.
DP.549.0217:
Oh, howdy! Come visiting again?
What kinds of Pokémon’d you bring?\f
DP.549.0218:
I jog every morning to keep my
Pokémon fit.\f
DP.549.0219:
Oops!
You threw off my running rhythm.
DP.549.0220:
Being healthy is number one!
Why don’t you come running with me?
DP.549.0221: Do you jog every morning, too?
DP.549.0222:
When I go on my jogs, I pass by lots
of people.\f
I have trouble remembering faces,
but we did meet before, right?\f
DP.549.0234:
I want to be a Pokémon when I grow
up!
DP.549.0235:
Hi, hi!
I’m a Pokémon!\f
...I think you already know, but
we’re going to battle again!\f
DP.549.0239:
Ty: You’re not supposed to intrude
on my time with Sue!\f
DP.549.0240:
Ty: I only have eyes for Sue.
Maybe that’s why we lost?
DP.549.0241:
Ty: Sue, even in defeat, you’re
so beautiful...!
DP.549.0242:
Ty: I don’t want to do anything
without Sue...\f
Bring two Pokémon at least, OK?
DP.549.0243:
Ty: Did you come back to intrude
on my time with Sue?\f
DP.549.0244:
Sue: Huh?
You want to battle with me?\f
I will if I can team with Ty!\f
DP.549.0246:
Sue: We lost... Ty, I need a hug
to make it all better!
DP.549.0247:
Sue: I only want to do things
with Ty!\f
Don’t you have two Pokémon?
DP.549.0248:
Sue: Oh, it’s you again!
I’ll battle if I can team with Ty!\f
DP.549.0257:
Jogging is about rhythm.
Battling is about rhythm, too!\f
DP.549.0258:
In a sense, I suppose that was a
finish line of sorts.
DP.549.0259:
When your rhythm gets thrown off,
everything seems out of whack.
DP.549.0260:
When I was jogging the other day,
a wild Pokémon came after me.\f
I ran so fast, I was on top of the
waves, I swear!
DP.549.0261:
Jogging is about rhythm.
Battling is about rhythm, too.\r
Our rematch is also about rhythm!\f
DP.549.0262:
Emma: We battle together!
That’s why we’re tough!\f
DP.549.0264:
Emma: You’re awesome!
Are you maybe a Pokémon genius?
DP.549.0265:
Emma: We won’t play with you if you
don’t have two Pokémon!
DP.549.0266:
Emma: When I battle with Lil,
we shouldn’t lose!\f
DP.549.0267:
Lil: We’re gonna crunch and
munch you all up!\f
DP.549.0269:
Lil: We’re going to be tough
Trainers, too! We decided!
DP.549.0270: Lil: Only one Pokémon is too lonesome!
DP.549.0271:
Lil: You munched us all up last
time, but it’s our turn now!\f
DP.549.0272:
Hey, check this out! Look at the
luster of my Pokémon’s fur!\f
DP.549.0273: Hey, hey, did you take a good look?
DP.549.0274:
Every day, I brush my Pokémon a
hundred strokes. Then, I do me.
DP.549.0275:
I brushed my party a lot.
So we’d be ready for a rematch!\f
DP.549.0276:
I’m a rookie breeder, but I’ll do
my very best!\f
DP.549.0277:
It’s all right!
I’m still a rookie!
DP.549.0278:
How to raise Pokémon?
Umm... It’s all about love, right?
DP.549.0279:
I can’t be a rookie forever.
I’ve learned a lot since we last met.\f
DP.549.0302:
Teri: Yay! We’re gonna battle with
lots of Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0303: Teri: Even with both of us, we lost.
DP.549.0304: Teri: Our mommy is a twin, too.
DP.549.0305:
Teri: We want to battle with lots
of Pokémon.
DP.549.0306:
Teri: Yay! We’re gonna battle with
lots of Pokémon again!\f
DP.549.0307:
Tia: Yay! We’re gonna have a battle
with three Trainers!\f
DP.549.0309:
Tia: When Mommy and Aunty and me
and Teri get together, it’s really\r
confusing and fun!
DP.549.0310:
Tia: We want to have a battle with
three Trainers.
DP.549.0311:
Tia: Yay! We’re gonna have another
battle with three Trainers!\f
DP.549.0312:
My Pokémon toughened up from
working on the ranch.\f
I’m right proud of them!\f
DP.549.0313:
Hahahah! Your Pokémon sure can be
counted on!
DP.549.0314:
When I cuddle with my Pokémon, I can
feel not just their bodies’ warmth, but\r
their compassion.
DP.549.0315:
Howdy! You’re that tough little
Trainer! I remember you!\f
Check out my farm-toughened Pokémon!
They’re my pride and joy!\f
DP.549.0316:
I’m warmed up and limber.
I’m OK to battle!\f
DP.549.0318:
Actually, I wanted to make a run
for it... That’s a joke.
DP.549.0319:
I’m going to keep running.
Just as long as there’s a road...
DP.549.0320:
I’ve been training so I can have
a rematch with you.\f
I’m OK to battle!\f
DP.549.0321:
Matt: Uhohoho! I’ll show y’all how
tightly I’ve bonded with my daughter!\f
DP.549.0322:
Matt: Parent-and-child power couldn’t
get the job done.
DP.549.0323:
Matt: I reckon the bonds between you
and your Pokémon are like the bonds\r
parents share with their kids.
DP.549.0324:
Matt: Oh, there’s no way you could
beat us both with one Pokémon.
DP.549.0325:
Matt: Ayuh? You’re here to check the
bond I have with my daughter again?\f
DP.549.0326:
Ava: I can get away with slacking
off if I have my Pokémon out!\f
DP.549.0328:
Ava: Papa, I’m sorry! I promise I’ll
work harder starting tomorrow!
DP.549.0329:
Ava: You’re battling me and my pa.
One Pokémon won’t cut it, dear!
DP.549.0330:
Ava: Oh, hi! It’s good y’all came
calling on us again!\f
I can take a break from work if I’m
battling Pokémon. Lucky for me!\f
DP.549.0331:
I am one of the Ninja Trio!
Being discovered means I must battle!\f
DP.549.0333:
My cover is blown, so what should
I do?\f
Maybe I’ll go catch some Contests in
Hearthome City. Maybe I’ll do that.
DP.549.0334:
Do you remember me?
I am one of the Ninja Trio!\r
Being discovered means I must battle!\f
DP.549.0335:
I am one of the Ninja Trio!
Being discovered means I must battle!\f
DP.549.0337:
While I hid in the tall grass, I
sensed Pokémon all around me!\f
Furtive sounds of movement...
Stifled cries... I heard them!
DP.549.0338:
You don’t remember me?
I am one of the Ninja Trio!\r
Being discovered means I must battle!\f
DP.549.0339:
I am one of the Ninja Trio!
Being discovered means I must battle!\f
But how did you discover me?
Don’t tell me you’re a ninja, too!\f
DP.549.0341:
A Pokémon Trainer’s good at finding
stuff, I guess.
DP.549.0342:
You should join us so we can form
the Ninja Quartet!\f
Anyways, let’s battle!\f
DP.549.0343:
You seem to have a lot of confidence.
Let’s see if it’s justified!\f
DP.549.0344:
Haha!
A total loss for me!
DP.549.0345:
You seem to have an abundance of
talent. It’s pretty amazing.
DP.549.0346:
When I lost to you last time, I was
just unlucky.\f
DP.549.0347:
As an Ace Trainer, I have to take
battles in stride.\f
I need to stay cool and calm whether
I win or lose.\f
DP.549.0349:
How dare you beat us!
Go away! Go!
DP.549.0350:
Last time, I got a little emotional
over losing...\f
I’ll stay cool and calm today!\f
DP.549.0351:
Me lose to someone so young?
I daresay not!\f
DP.549.0352:
The power of youth...
It’s startling.
DP.549.0353:
Somehow, it makes me happy seeing
a young, yet sure-footed, Trainer\r
such as yourself.
DP.549.0354:
The power of youth and the technique
of the Veteran...\f
Let us battle again to see which
shall prevail!\f
DP.549.0355:
This buff physique isn’t just for
show!\f
DP.549.0357:
Why? Is it because my training isn’t
enough?!
DP.549.0358:
My buff physique!
Feast your eyes on it again!\f
DP.549.0359:
I just startled you!\f
While you’re still struggling to
recover, I’ll already be the winner!\f
DP.549.0360:
Oh, what’s that?
You’re supposed to be fumbling more.
DP.549.0361:
I need a better reaction out of you.
I feel silly hiding for so long!
DP.549.0362:
You just saw me, and I bet you
thought, “Long time no see.”\f
While you’re still thinking that, I’ll
already be the winner!\f
DP.549.0363:
We ninjas appear where you least
expect us!\f
DP.549.0365:
When I hide out like this, I think
about what it must be like for\r
Pokémon inside their Poké Balls.
DP.549.0366:
Wah! Another chance encounter with
a foe who defeated me before!\f
DP.549.0367:
A ninja can use all sorts of cool
techniques!\f
DP.549.0368:
Hmm...
My ninja techniques failed to work...
DP.549.0369:
There’s a ninja Gym Leader somewhere
far away.\f
I should become a devotee of theirs.
DP.549.0370:
What’s with you?
You’re not a ninja yet?\f
DP.549.0371:
Don’t be shocked when you see my
Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0373:
A dragon Pokémon’s real power is
nothing like mine!
DP.549.0374:
You again?\f
You must really like that dragon
Pokémon I use.\f
DP.549.0375:
I’ll teach you about the charms of
bird Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0376:
Wow. I’ll admit to being surprised
by that outcome.
DP.549.0377:
The sight of you battling...
It was simply a wonder to watch!
DP.549.0378:
Are you finally noticing the great
qualities of bird Pokémon?\f
DP.549.0379:
Zac: Jen, watch this! I’m going to
use everything you’ve taught me!\f
DP.549.0380:
Zac: Wow. Someone that’s even
better than Jen...
DP.549.0381:
Zac: I don’t care if I get to meet
the greatest Trainer in the region...\r
I’d still rather learn from Jen.
DP.549.0382:
Zac: Wouldn’t you rather battle
with the two of us?
DP.549.0383:
Zac: This time, I’m not gonna let you
down, Jen! I promise!\f
DP.549.0384:
Jen: Here comes a Trainer.
Zac, you ready? Let’s do this!\f
DP.549.0385:
Jen: I just got embarrassed in front
of my little buddy here...
DP.549.0386:
Jen: Zac, I’m so sorry.
I’m a failure as your instructor.
DP.549.0387:
Jen: Would you like to have a
two-on-two Pokémon battle with us?
DP.549.0388:
Jen: Here comes our Trainer!
Are you ready this time?\f
DP.549.0390:
Oh, you!
I’m going to peck you for that!
DP.549.0391:
People say there’s a bird Pokémon
that can learn human speech.\f
Do you know anything about it?
DP.549.0392:
My bird Pokémon has such gorgeous
wings.\f
It must have been some sort of a
mistake that we lost last time!\f
DP.549.0396:
ZUBAT! Doesn’t that sound like a
ninja bursting from cover?\f
DP.549.0398:
Sowing confusion among the foe is
one way a ninja battles.\f
A Pokémon can’t overcome its
confusion unless it switches out.
DP.549.0399:
The shinobi live by speed!
I’ll get in my attacks before you do!\f
DP.549.0400:
See how Mt. Coronet towers above us.
I want to be big like that one day!\f
DP.549.0401:
A powerful presence towers before
me... It is you!
DP.549.0402:
Mt. Coronet has long been known as
an ancient and mysterious mountain.
DP.549.0403:
Hmm?! You tower before
me again?\f
It’s as if you’re Mt. Coronet!\f
DP.549.0404:
Hah! Hah!
I’m psyched for this! Here goes!\f
DP.549.0405: I don’t get why we can’t win.
DP.549.0406:
I guess I ought to study winning
techniques for a change...
DP.549.0407:
Hah! Hah!
This time, I’m psyched up!\f
DP.549.0408:
Speed is a ninja’s best weapon!
Can you keep up?\f
DP.549.0409: I did a lot to conceal myself, too...
DP.549.0410:
I’ll wait here for a weaker-looking
Trainer and then ambush them!
DP.549.0411:
I became even faster!
How can you hope to keep up?\f
DP.549.0412:
I go everywhere with my NOCTOWL.
We’re gonna show you owl best! Ha!\f
DP.549.0413:
We did our best. That’s what
matters. Right?
DP.549.0414:
Even on cold days, just being with
my NOCTOWL keeps me warm!
DP.549.0415:
I curled up inside my NOCTOWL’s wings
and waited for you to return!\f
DP.549.0416:
Whilst exploring the ruins, I spotted
a Trainer! I must investigate!\f
DP.549.0417:
My investigation has revealed the
Trainer to be tough! Ouch...
DP.549.0418:
Celestic Town is an old town.
I’m sure to find something cool.
DP.549.0419:
Whilst exploring the ruins, I spotted
you again! I will now investigate!\f
DP.549.0420:
I’ll have you know my Pokémon
sleeps on a fancy imported bed.\f
DP.549.0421:
H-humph! There’s an unseemly sense
of desperation about you. Ugh!
DP.549.0422:
Oh, my poor little battler is
all tuckered out...\f
I’ll let it sleep it off in that bed
I had sent from overseas.
DP.549.0423:
I do this only because I love my
Pokémon. Winning isn’t that important.\f
DP.549.0424:
I’d like to begin now.
Are you quite prepared?\f
DP.549.0425: Oh, how very impressive of you.
DP.549.0426:
Would you care to inform me of who
the amazing tutor you’ve hired for\r
your Pokémon is?
DP.549.0427:
Oh, I’m delighted to see you again.
Are you prepared?\f
DP.549.0428:
If it pleases you, would you care for
a Pokémon battle with me?\f
DP.549.0429:
Your handling of Pokémon is
quite impeccable, I must say.
DP.549.0430:
Bahaha! I was invited by the master
of the Pokémon Mansion.
DP.549.0431:
If it pleases you, would you care for
a rematch with me?\f
DP.549.0432:
I’ve never battled a young Trainer
like you before. I’m quite nervous!\f
DP.549.0433:
Oh, dear... That wasn’t anything like
battling with my friends.
DP.549.0434:
Usually, I’ll have matches with
members of my social club.
DP.549.0435:
Oh, it’s you again, dear?\f
It makes me a little nervous to ask,
but may I have a rematch?\f
DP.549.0439:
Hold it right there, citizen!
Walking around at night is unsafe!\f
DP.549.0440:
You’ve got tough partners with you.
Carry on, citizen. Carry on.
DP.549.0441:
Out so late? Does your mother
know you’re out so late?
DP.549.0442:
Well, hello there!\f
That’s very civil minded of you to
say hello to your local Policeman!
DP.549.0443:
Didn’t I already give you a warning?
It’s unsafe to walk around at night!\f
DP.549.0444:
Are there any shady-looking
characters around here?\f
DP.549.0445:
Now, just hold on. I didn’t say that
you were shady looking!
DP.549.0446:
Don’t go hanging out with any
shady-looking characters! You hear?
DP.549.0447:
Patrolling night and day sure is
exhausting... Yawn...
DP.549.0448:
Any shady-looking characters around?
I’m always on the lookout for punks.\f
Expecting some shady dude to actually
pop up... Does that make me weird?\f
DP.549.0449:
Let’s enjoy a fierce battle in the
chilly night winds! Brrrr! Refreshing!\f
DP.549.0450:
It was too dark for me to see very
well... Yeah... Too dark.
DP.549.0451:
Oops, I’d better get back to my
beat before the boss radios me...
DP.549.0452:
Yo! Hanging tough, Trainer? Word!
I’m trying to make my lingo more hip!
DP.549.0453:
Still training this late?\f
That makes you either a bad kid or
a good Trainer. Which one is it?\f
DP.549.0454:
I’m on patrol seeing whether or not
there’s any trouble afoot!\f
DP.549.0455:
Big trouble! Officer in need
of assistance!
DP.549.0456:
Your toughness is too much!
I’m in serious trouble!
DP.549.0457:
I don’t know how to say this, but
maybe we patrol too much.
DP.549.0458:
Let me ask you a question!
Are you tough enough to take me?\f
DP.549.0459:
Can’t you see I’m fishing?
Don’t talk! You’ll spook the fish!\f
DP.549.0460:
Sheesh... I let a Pokémon, and that
battle, get away from me.
DP.549.0461:
Fishing and battling are delicate
things--as am I. Is that wrong?
DP.549.0462:
You can see I’m fishing, can’t you?
Then don’t talk to me! Geez!\f
DP.549.0463:
I wish some fishing-loving lady’d come
along. But no, it’s all just Trainers.\f
DP.549.0464:
Sure, so I lost.
But I’ll keep on fishing.
DP.549.0465:
If you know of any ladies that like
fishing, help me sink the hook in ’em!
DP.549.0466:
Umm... Yeah. Weren’t you that person
who preferred Pokémon over fishing?\f
DP.549.0467:
Water Pokémon sure get happy when
it rains. So do I!\f
DP.549.0468:
Oof. Just got trampled right under
your feet that time!
DP.549.0469:
Yup, a kid like you should be running
around outside, rain or shine.
DP.549.0470:
I’ve been fishing here ever since
I lost to you.\f
DP.549.0471: Can you keep up with us?\f
DP.549.0473:
However hard you battle, make sure
you never harm the environment.\f
Try not to break any branches or
trample any plants, OK?
DP.549.0474:
Hey! You’re that high-energy Trainer!
I bet you can’t keep up with us now!\f
DP.549.0475:
Are you doing your part to protect
the environment? I am!\f
DP.549.0476:
Good. You seem to be a kindhearted
Trainer.
DP.549.0477:
People, Pokémon... All of us!
We’re all a part of nature.
DP.549.0478:
Heya, long time!\f
Are you enjoying your nature-filled
adventure with Pokémon?\f
DP.549.0479:
Our job is to protect the natural
environment of this region.\f
DP.549.0480: We’ve got to get tougher than this...
DP.549.0481:
I love how natural it is here.
I wish I could live out here.
DP.549.0482:
What do you think? The environment
is unharmed in this area.\f
DP.549.0491:
I find it reassuring to be on this
damp soil...\f
DP.549.0492:
Ufufufufu...
You had to beat me...
DP.549.0493:
It feels good to mope here after a
loss... Ufufufufu...
DP.549.0494:
Is Damp my favorite Pokémon ability?
Fufufu... Anything will do...\f
DP.549.0505:
I’m proud of my Pokémon!
Here, I’ll show you why!\f
DP.549.0506:
Youch! You sure showed me how tough
you were.
DP.549.0507:
Oh, what have we here?
That’s a Pokédex!\f
It records Pokémon data upon
sight? I’ve never seen one before!\f
I heard you can move the sun or
moon icon to check the Pokémon\r
habitat map by time of day!
DP.549.0508:
I take down details in my notebook
about Pokémon I’ve battled.\f
I’ll write more data down about your
Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0509:
Oh? Here comes a nice-looking
Trainer. This is worth evaluation.\f
DP.549.0510:
Our research has arrived at this one
conclusion: you’re a tough one!
DP.549.0511:
A huge variety of Pokémon live in the
Great Marsh.\f
You see, countless years ago,
this whole area was under the sea.
DP.549.0512:
Oh, how do you do? May I investigate
how much tougher you’ve become since\r
our last encounter?\f
DP.549.0513:
There are Pokémon that become more
powerful when it rains.\f
DP.549.0514:
Like rain, my tears flow from losing...
They call me the Rain Woman...
DP.549.0515:
I want to show off my pretty
parasol, but it will get dirty\r
in the rain.\f
Oh, such a big dilemma!
DP.549.0516: On rainy days, I get more energetic!\f
DP.549.0517: When it rains, I get more tense!\f
DP.549.0518:
It’s not very easy trying to battle
while holding an umbrella.
DP.549.0519:
If it rained every day, I could have
my umbrella open all the time.
DP.549.0520:
It’s not because it’s raining.
I just love umbrellas!\f
DP.549.0523:
I’m sorry, it wasn’t “sneaky”!
It should have been “tough”!
DP.549.0524:
We’re constantly on patrol.
That way, it’s safe even at night.
DP.549.0525:
Whoa! Hold it right there!
I’ve spotted a sneaky Trainer!\f
DP.549.0526:
I swim the whole year round.
I’m not losing a battle at sea!\f
DP.549.0527:
I lost in the sea...
But I swim the whole year round!
DP.549.0528:
When you’re out at sea, Water-type
Pokémon look more lively.
DP.549.0529:
I love the sea. It was only by fluke
that I lost last time.\f
DP.549.0530:
Brr... I’m starting to get chilly.
I could use a win to get warmed up.\f
DP.549.0531:
The chill of the sea, and the
coldness of defeat...\f
It’s a double whammy.
DP.549.0532:
Look at my lips...
They’re the color of prunes!
DP.549.0533:
Brr... I’m starting to feel chilly.
How about a hot Pokémon battle?\f
DP.549.0534:
Hi, wave-riding Trainer!
How about a battle on the sea?\f
DP.549.0536:
Maybe I should switch to surfing,
too...
DP.549.0537:
Oh, hi again!
You’re that wave-riding Trainer!\f
DP.549.0538:
Hello, there!
Aren’t you going to swim?\f
DP.549.0539:
What’s saltier?
My tears or the sea...
DP.549.0540:
There aren’t many sea routes that
you can swim in Sinnoh.\f
It makes me want to take a vacation
in the Hoenn region.
DP.549.0541:
When I see people surfing, I don’t
feel jealous or anything.\f
I just simply love to swim!\f
DP.549.0542:
Isn’t this nice?
I love my inner tube!\f
DP.549.0543:
I couldn’t move very well because
my inner tube got in the way!
DP.549.0544:
My mom blew up my inner tube for me.
I ran out of breath just opening it!
DP.549.0545:
You can come back all you like, but
you can’t have my inner tube!\f
DP.549.0547: I lost, and now I feel hungry.
DP.549.0548:
That cloud looks like ice cream!
I wish I could eat some! Mmm...
DP.549.0549:
I’ve been dawdling here all this
time!\f
DP.549.0553:
Traveling alone, are you? That’s
impressive! How about we battle?\f
DP.549.0555:
Maybe I’ll go work out down at the
restaurant again.\f
That place gets different people in
every day, and they all like battles.
DP.549.0556:
Hey, lonesome traveler! Let’s break
the monotony with another battle!\f
DP.549.0557:
Awwww!
I almost had that fish reeled in!\f
DP.549.0558:
You need to have more respect for
a grown-up...
DP.549.0559: You need to settle down some.
DP.549.0560:
Awwww!
I was just reeling that fish in!\f
...Oh, no. Not you again!\f
DP.549.0569:
Let me demonstrate my technique.
It’s how this grown-up battles.\f
DP.549.0571:
You’re so much more of a Trainer
than you look!
DP.549.0572:
Give this grown-up another chance to
demonstrate her technique.\f
DP.549.0573:
It seems to be very mystifying.
That’s the sense I get.\f
To show you what I mean, I’ll battle
with the Pokémon I found.\f
DP.549.0574:
I can’t win with Pokémon that I’m
not familiar with...
DP.549.0575:
It seems to be very mystifying.
That’s the sense I get.
DP.549.0576:
Ah-ha! I found me a Trainer!\f
I challenge you to battle with
the Pokémon I’ve found!\f
DP.549.0577:
I’ve been traveling around the world
chasing stories on mysteries.\f
It’s made me pretty tough!\f
DP.549.0579:
There are mysteries waiting for me
to investigate around the world.\f
This is no time to be feeling sorry
for myself.
DP.549.0580:
There’s an endless supply of
mysteries around the world.\f
Running into you here just happens
to be one such mystery!\f
DP.549.0593:
I’d sensed the presence of a
Trainer for a while. It was you!\f
DP.549.0594: Defeating you will be no easy matter.
DP.549.0595:
Is it possible to become more
powerful by understanding Pokémon?
DP.549.0596:
I was certain that you’d return.
I sensed your presence, you see.\f
DP.549.0597:
Look out! Behind you!
What is it?\f
DP.549.0598:
My plan to spook you didn’t go over
well at all.
DP.549.0599:
You might be tough, but let down
your guard at your own risk!
DP.549.0600:
Wah! That thing curled around your
neck!\f
...Nice scarf, kid!\f
DP.549.0601:
Win or lose...
Who knows how this’ll go?\f
We’re playing for keeps!\f
DP.549.0602: I guess wrong far too often.
DP.549.0603:
I can’t get into the groove...
That’s enough for today.
DP.549.0604:
I wasn’t feeling lucky the other day.
Things will be different today.\f
DP.549.0605:
For the sake of my collection, I
take on people I know I can’t beat.\f
That’s what a Collector does.\f
DP.549.0606:
You should boast more about
that last attack.
DP.549.0607:
I’m proud of having a Pokémon that
others don’t have.\f
Oh, and I’m also proud of winning
the second prize on Jubilife TV’s\r
daily drawings.
DP.549.0608:
For the sake of my collection, I
keep battling people I can’t beat.\f
That’s what a Collector does.\f
DP.549.0609:
Whaaat? You do!
You do have a Pokédex!\f
DP.549.0610: I’m so envious of your Pokédex...
DP.549.0611:
Trainers have all sorts of Pokémon
with them, right?\f
So, the more Trainers you battle,
the more your Pokédex will fill up!
DP.549.0612:
I don’t have a Pokédex, but that’s
all right.\f
You come here and show me!\f
DP.549.0613:
To find my favorite Pokémon, I’ll go
east, west, or any which way!\f
DP.549.0615:
If you’re trying to find the Pokémon
you want, you need to go everywhere!\f
Not just east and west, either.
South and north are important, too!
DP.549.0616:
For my favorite Pokémon, I’ll go
east, west, or any which way!\f
...Saying that, I’ve been wandering
around here all this time.\f
DP.549.0617:
Oh? You want to teach me something
about Pokémon?\f
DP.549.0619:
There are so many kinds of Pokémon.
I can’t decide which one to pamper.
DP.549.0620:
Yoohoo, little kid! Can you teach me
some more about Pokémon?\f
DP.549.0637:
I was snoozing, you claim?
I merely feigned sleep! Hiyah!\f
DP.549.0640:
Am I lost, you ask?
I merely feigned it! Hiyah!\f
DP.549.0641:
Check the sharpness of my fighting
Pokémon’s moves.\f
DP.549.0644:
I sharpened my Pokémon’s moves more
for when I saw you again!\f
DP.549.0645:
Every drop of sweat I shed makes
me that much stronger!\f
DP.549.0646:
I don’t want to believe this
happened, but a loss is a loss.
DP.549.0647: Time to shed some more sweat!
DP.549.0648:
We’re going to win this time!\f
Don’t believe me?
Then you test it out!\f
DP.549.0652:
Running-huff is-huff good-huff.
Over-huff doing-huff it isn’t-huff!\r
Huff-huff, huff-huff.
DP.549.0654:
I’ll battle anyone.
That’s how I’ll get better!\f
DP.549.0655:
You won and I lost, but the both of
us gained something from this.
DP.549.0656:
In a Pokémon battle, it doesn’t
matter how old or young you are.\f
Your gender doesn’t matter, either.
Nothing like that means anything!
DP.549.0657:
I’ll battle against people who’ve
beaten me again and again.\f
By doing that, we both grow a little
as Trainers.\f
DP.549.0658:
I’m taking the Veilstone Gym
challenge. But first...\f
DP.549.0659: You made me lose my confidence...
DP.549.0660:
I think about Pokémon all day long.
I was confident, you know.
DP.549.0661:
Oh, it’s you again!\f
I’ve regained my confidence.
Let’s have another battle!\f
DP.549.0662:
I’m a treasure hunter.\f
Today, the loot is a victory from
you!\f
DP.549.0663:
I can’t win.
You’re too much to take!
DP.549.0664:
If one’s after treasures, maybe the
Underground is the better choice.
DP.549.0665:
I’m a treasure hunter.\f
This time, I will have my trophy:
a victory from you!\f
DP.549.0666:
If I battle now, won’t it mess up my
usual pace?\f
DP.549.0668:
Sticking to one’s own goal is more
important than it seems.\f
If you match your goal with someone
else, you’ll lose your identity.
DP.549.0669:
Well, yes, sometimes I do walk.
I even stop on occasion.\f
I am human, after all.
DP.549.0670:
Up till now, I’d maintained my pace.
But seeing you threw me off!\f
DP.549.0674:
I’m an ace.
I can see that you’re an ace, too!\f
DP.549.0676:
You can pretend to be ordinary, but
your eyes tell me another story.
DP.549.0677:
A real ace doesn’t get hung up on
getting wins.\f
A real ace sets sights consistently
higher to improve themselves.\f
DP.549.0678:
I always battle for keeps.
This is no drill!\f
DP.549.0679:
Good job!
That was an excellent battle.
DP.549.0680:
If you don’t play for keeps, you’ll
lose battles you should be dominating.
DP.549.0681:
When I lost to you last time, I was
battling for keeps.\f
But this time, I really mean it.
This is seriously for keeps!\f
DP.549.0682:
I’m fully kitted up and equipped!
Anytime will be fine!\f
DP.549.0684:
Perhaps I should maybe change into
a more comfy outfit...
DP.549.0685:
I’m fully equipped again today!
Anytime you’re ready will be fine!\f
DP.549.0686:
To be ready to answer any call!
To be ready to accept any challenge!\f
That is the way of a Trainer!\f
DP.549.0688:
You can make all the preparations in
the world, but if it doesn’t work, it\r
doesn’t work.
DP.549.0689:
I got everything ready so we could
have a rematch whenever you come.\f
DP.549.0690:
I’m skiing right now, but OK.
As we Skiers say, “Spur thing!”\f
DP.549.0692:
I quite enjoyed that battle!
Let us meet again. Slalom!
DP.549.0693:
We might get snowbound, but why not?
It’s on the “spur” of the moment!\f
DP.549.0694:
Are you a novice?
Or are you capable?\f
DP.549.0695:
I never expected you to be an
expert...
DP.549.0696:
You know how to play your Pokémon
with an edge!
DP.549.0697:
Knowing you to be an expert,
I challenge you to a rematch!\f
DP.549.0698:
What’s fun about winter?
Number one, skiing!\r
Number two, Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0700:
If it was skiing, I wouldn’t lose.
I should go ski with my Pokémon...
DP.549.0701:
You’re a better Trainer than a skier.
But I’ll challenge you again anyway!\f
DP.549.0702:
How do you expect to battle in this
heavy snow?\f
DP.549.0704:
It’s so cold here, but here you are,
dressed all lightly.\f
I guess you kids are made tougher
than people my age.
DP.549.0705:
Why would you wander around here?
You must really like this area.\f
DP.549.0706:
I can withstand this cold. That means
I can take any kind of attack!\f
DP.549.0708:
Oh, gosh, this is bad! I think I’m
losing feeling all over my body!
DP.549.0709:
Oh? I’ve seen your face before.
What say we battle?\f
DP.549.0710:
This cold is but nothing compared
to the fire that burns in my heart!\f
DP.549.0711: Your heart burns as hot as mine!
DP.549.0712:
The weather clears up sometimes.
The view is breathtaking then.
DP.549.0713:
We’ll come at you with our hearts
ablaze!\f
DP.549.0715:
Whew...
You are alive, aren’t you?
DP.549.0716:
Around these parts, perhaps because
of all the snow, there are many\r
folktales of hauntings...
DP.549.0717:
This isn’t like last time. See how
much I’ve trained since then!\f
DP.549.0718:
I’ll show you the techniques I had
drummed into me at ski school!\f
DP.549.0719:
I don’t believe it...
My techniques were rebuffed...
DP.549.0720:
I should have enrolled in a Pokémon
Trainers’ school...
DP.549.0721:
Since I lost to you last time,
I redid my training at ski school!\f
DP.549.0722:
We Skiers feel Mother Nature through
the soles of our feet!\f
DP.549.0723: I got a good taste of your power!
DP.549.0724:
Trainers get an appreciation of life
through Pokémon. At least I think so.
DP.549.0725:
I knew you were headed here.
I felt it with the soles of my feet!\f
DP.549.0726:
I’ve been skiing with Pokémon since
I was just five years old.\f
DP.549.0728:
The scenery doesn’t change very much
around here. Don’t go getting lost!
DP.549.0729:
Oh... Did you maybe get lost again?
You should pay more attention!\f
DP.549.0730:
Rainy days make me feel blue...\f
But the instant it starts to snow,
I’m as happy as can be!\f
DP.549.0732:
Can any of your Pokémon use that
hidden move to climb cliffs?
DP.549.0733:
You really must like snow.\f
After all, if you didn’t, I doubt that
you’d come here so often!\f
DP.549.0734:
Poof!\f
You’ve got a good eye spotting me!\f
DP.549.0735:
You also saw through my weak
spots...
DP.549.0736:
I’ll play with my Pokémon--even in a
blizzard!
DP.549.0737:
Poof!\f
You saw through my camouflage again!\f
DP.549.0738:
There are several kinds of ninjas.
Are you an Iga or a Kouga ninja?\f
DP.549.0739: I’m not much of a ninja either way...
DP.549.0740:
I wonder why everyone stops being
a ninja when they grow up?
DP.549.0741:
I forged my willpower in the snow!
Witness my snowy might!\f
DP.549.0742:
To make sure I’m more agile,
I always dress light!\f
DP.549.0744:
I might have to go home and dress
warmer than this...
DP.549.0745:
I’m sticking it out and staying lightly
dressed!\f
DP.549.0760:
When nothing’s biting, the smart thing
to do is just call it a day.
DP.549.0761:
Yeah, yeah...
Nothing’s biting today either.\f
DP.549.0770:
Outdoor fishing for the win!\f
Shouting doesn’t help my fishing any,
but shout I must!\f
DP.549.0772:
Oh, right... My shouting is scaring
away the Pokémon.
DP.549.0773:
Super outdoor fishing!
Shouting still doesn’t help!\f
DP.549.0774:
Let it rock!
It’s the rhythm of battle!\f
DP.549.0775:
Can you hear it?
That’s my guitar weeping...
DP.549.0776:
I’m too torn up to sing anymore...
I am so cool that way...
DP.549.0777:
Rock ’n’ roll!
We’ll beat it out again!\r
Our rhythm of battle!\f
DP.549.0778:
A man of the sea is also a man of
Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0780:
You’ve got what it takes to be
a Trainer among Trainers!
DP.549.0781:
Rudder hard to starboard!
Hold on! Nobody go overboard!\f
DP.549.0791:
I love my inner tube.
So I admire jellyfish Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0793:
I wish Professor Rowan would
give me a Pokédex.\f
But that old guy looks kind of
scary.
DP.549.0794:
I love my inner tube.
So I admire jellyfish Pokémon.\f
Won’t you hang out with us and just
bob around on the waves?\f
DP.549.0795:
I can’t swim without my floaty.
But my Pokémon sure can!\f
DP.549.0797:
My mommy said that Professor Rowan
is really kindhearted.
DP.549.0798:
Oh! You’re the Trainer who played
with us before!\f
Can you see if my Pokémon have grown
stronger?\f
DP.549.0799:
I only live to swim. Teach me what’s
so fun about Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0801: I’ll try swimming with Pokémon next.
DP.549.0802:
Yo! You’re that Trainer who taught
me how fun Pokémon can be.\f
Let’s have another battle, you and
me!\f
DP.549.0805:
I forgot to do my stretching
exercises...
DP.549.0806:
Hi, I was waiting for you!
Ready? On your marks, get set...\f
DP.549.0807:
OK! Get your breathing in order!
OK! You’re ready to go!\f
DP.549.0809:
Listen, I have something important to
say to you.\f
Don’t drown in your own talent.
DP.549.0810:
OK! You’re ready to go!
This time, I’m going for the win!\f
DP.549.0811:
Swimming is a full-body exercise.
You should swim, too!\f
DP.549.0813:
Well, Pokémon’s one thing, but you
should take up swimming, too!
DP.549.0814:
Hiya, Pokémon-riding Trainer!
You should be swimming like me!\f
DP.549.0815:
The human body floats more easily in
the sea, so it’s easy to swim!\f
DP.549.0818:
Pokémon can stay afloat even while
carrying someone. That’s so cool!\f
DP.549.0819:
I may not look it now, but I’m a
star. I’m always with my Pokémon.\f
DP.549.0820: I lost, but at least I had fun.
DP.549.0821:
If it were an underwater Pokémon
show, I would have shined.
DP.549.0822:
Oh, hi! Are you back to see our
Pokémon show again?\f
DP.549.0823:
I bought a new bikini!
It’s this year’s newest model!\f
DP.549.0825:
I made a mistake buying this bikini...
It’s a little too tight...
DP.549.0826:
Did I show you already?
My bikini, new for this year!\f
DP.549.0835:
Well? Does it look like I’m swimming
gracefully?\f
DP.549.0837:
I may look like I’m swimming
gracefully, but beneath the surface\r
I’m kicking furiously.
DP.549.0838:
You were attracted by my graceful
swimming again, weren’t you?\f
DP.549.0839:
Water-type Pokémon come in a great
variety of shapes and sizes.\f
I’ll show you the water Pokémon that
I’ve picked for myself!\f
DP.549.0840:
I can’t boast when I lose...
I’m so disappointed...
DP.549.0841:
Sure I lost, but watch me! I’ll get
tougher with water Pokémon.
DP.549.0842:
This time, my water Pokémon will show
you why I’m so proud of them!\f
DP.549.0843:
Hey. I like fishing.
But my true love is battling!\f
DP.549.0845:
If you don’t know how to fish, you’re
missing half of life’s enjoyment.\f
If you don’t know Pokémon...
You’re missing out on all of it!
DP.549.0846:
Come on, battle me again!
You know I love to fish and battle!\f
DP.549.0850:
People consider me an Ace Trainer.\f
Let me demonstrate the skills that
earned me that title!\f
DP.549.0851:
I’m burning with jealousy over your
raw talent!
DP.549.0852:
I think keeping up the effort to
better yourself is a talent in itself.
DP.549.0853:
Last time, you beat me before I had
a chance to show you my skill.\f
This time, I’ll show you why they
consider me an ace!\f
DP.549.0854:
Oh? You intend to beat me?
I am an ace, you know.\f
DP.549.0855:
I see...
I have to concede defeat.
DP.549.0856:
To not be depressed by a loss...
That’s one trait of an ace.
DP.549.0857:
Ace Trainers always work to improve
their natural-born talents.\f
DP.549.0858:
You’re going to the Pal Park?\f
It’s not right that you get to go
before a Collector like me!\f
DP.549.0860:
Pal Park, huh? I wonder what kinds
of Pokémon you can see there?
DP.549.0861:
Listen, did you go to the Pal Park?
What was it like? What was it like?\f
DP.549.0862:
I’m in the middle of fishing, but OK.
I’ll be happy to sink you.\f
DP.549.0864:
The one that got away was a big
one...
DP.549.0865:
Once I hook it, no fish gets away
from me!\f
A Trainer walking by also can’t get
free of my clutches!\f
DP.549.0866:
Hi, traveler!
How would you like to battle?\f
DP.549.0868:
I like to fish.
You’re a traveler.\f
Farewell, until we meet again!
DP.549.0869:
Hi, traveler!\f
I’ve forgotten your name, but we’ve
battled before, haven’t we?\f
DP.549.0870:
I’m getting bored of fishing.
Let’s have a quick battle!\f
DP.549.0872:
Thanks, Trainer.
That was a good change of pace.
DP.549.0873:
Yo! I remember how our battle was a
good change of pace before.\f
Let’s have another quick battle!\f
DP.549.0874:
If I stare at the water’s surface
for too long, I begin to forget what\r
I was doing in the first place.\f
DP.549.0875: I don’t know how, but I lost!
DP.549.0876:
Oh, right...
I was fishing, wasn’t I?
DP.549.0877:
When I looked up from staring at the
water’s surface, I saw your face.\f
I’m not sure about what I was just
doing, but do you want to battle?\f
DP.549.0890:
It takes both brains and brawn
when you’re out at sea.\f
Aye, it’s not an easy job, the
Sailor’s life!\f
DP.549.0892:
If you were to become a Sailor, I’m
sure you’d make a good one!
DP.549.0893:
I’ll beat you this time and convince
you to become a Sailor!\f
DP.549.0894:
Oh, we’ll ride upon the sea,
in a boat, just you and me!\f
That’s the way of the Sailor!
Way of the Sailor. Sing it!\f
DP.549.0896:
You ought to think about becoming
a Sailor yourself.\f
It’s been great to be able to visit
different places around the world.
DP.549.0897:
Oh, we’ll ride upon the sea,
in a boat, just you and me!\f
That’s the way of the Sailor!
Way of the Sailor. You sing, too!\f
DP.549.0898:
Who’s there?!
What do you think you’re doing?!\f
DP.549.0899:
I happen to be rather jumpy, so
everyone looks suspicious to me.
DP.549.0900:
I’m easy to scare, and yet here I am
on patrol. Funny how things go.
DP.549.0901:
At night, I get tense and nervous.
I don’t know why.
DP.549.0902:
I’ll repeat myself! Who’s there?!
What do you think you’re doing?!\f
DP.549.0903:
I’m quite bored.
Care to break the monotony?\f
DP.549.0905:
I’ll go rest at the hotel.
I’ve had quite enough of this.
DP.549.0906:
Ah, it’s you. I’m bored again.
Care to break the monotony?\f
DP.549.0913:
After enjoying a meal at the hotel
restaurant, one has a battle.\f
That’s the social etiquette.\f
DP.549.0915:
Personally, I would rather just play
with Pokémon than battle with them.
DP.549.0916:
I only seem to run into you after
I go to the restaurant.\f
Etiquette calls for a battle after a
meal. Shall we?\f
DP.549.0917:
Look, look! Look at my Pokémon!
It’s really cool!\f
DP.549.0918:
Wowee! I had to hold on tight to
my inner tube!
DP.549.0919:
Pools are OK, but I like the sea
because Pokémon live there.
DP.549.0920:
Yay! You came to see my Pokémon
again, right? Look, look!\f
DP.549.0921:
Listen, listen! Can you tell me what
kind of Pokémon you have?\f
DP.549.0923:
I want to hang on to a BUIZEL and
just bob around.
DP.549.0924:
Listen, listen! Did you find any new
kinds of Pokémon?\f
DP.549.0936:
I came out here because I wanted to
see the Pokémon League for myself.\f
DP.549.0937:
I’m shocked...
No, really, I am.
DP.549.0938:
The way I battle now, well, I can
only look at the Pokémon League!\f
You, go on! You go to the Pokémon
League for me, too!
DP.549.0939:
I’ve been training here in hopes of
going to the Pokémon League.\f
DP.549.0940:
I’ve decided! If I can beat you, I’m
going to the Pokémon League!\f
DP.549.0942:
It’s OK. Just let me float away
like driftwood...
DP.549.0943:
I’ve decided! If I finally beat you,
I’m challenging the Pokémon League!\f
DP.549.0944:
It might not look like it, but I’m
traveling now.\f
DP.549.0945: You’ve got the upper hand on me.
DP.549.0946:
But you can be sure that there will
be bigger challenges in front of you.\f
Go! Go as far as you can! You alone can
broaden your horizons.
DP.549.0947:
I’m still on my journey...
Let’s have a battle!\f
DP.549.0948:
The sea around here is harsh.
It’s made me just as harsh!\f
DP.549.0950:
What? You’ve got that many Gym
Badges? No wonder you’re so tough...
DP.549.0951:
It’s me again! The harsh sea here
should have toughened me up more!\f
DP.549.0952:
My dream is to swim in the sea in
every region under the sun!\f
DP.549.0953:
Boo!
I’m not done with my dream!
DP.549.0954:
I wonder what the seas are like in
Kanto and Hoenn...?
DP.549.0955:
My new dream is to challenge all the
Pokémon Leagues in every region!\f
DP.549.0956:
Yes, I know I can surf, but I’d
rather swim instead.\f
It does seem weird, I agree.\f
DP.549.0958:
If you don’t know how, I’m willing to
show you how to swim.
DP.549.0959:
If you rely on your Pokémon all the
time, you’ll never learn how to swim!\f
DP.549.0960:
I train at a Pokémon Gym, too.\f
Don’t think you’re going to win
easily!\f
DP.549.0961:
Master Wake...
I’m so sorry to have failed you...
DP.549.0962:
What to do... Train at the Gym again,
or train by myself...
DP.549.0963:
I trained at the Gym after you beat
me. Let’s do it, gang!\f
DP.549.0964:
I’m determined to go to the Pokémon
League, no matter how hard it is.\f
DP.549.0966:
Losing won’t make me give up. The
Pokémon League isn’t going anywhere.
DP.549.0967:
It doesn’t matter how long it takes,
I’m going to the Pokémon League!\f
DP.549.0968: Excuse me for wearing my bikini!\f
DP.549.0969:
Was I multitasking too much, battling
and swimming at the same time?
DP.549.0970:
When I’m in my bikini, I’m at a loss
about where to carry my Poké Balls!
DP.549.0971:
Giggle...
Excuse me for wearing my bikini!\f
DP.549.0975:
Don’t get careless, even if you’re
facing someone familiar.\f
Do your deep-breathing exercises...\f
DP.549.0976:
Your Pokémon isn’t tired, even though
it’s carrying you on its back.\f
Let me see how strong that Pokémon
is, OK?\f
DP.549.0978:
I’m tired of swimming, so I’ll just
float around and get some rest.
DP.549.0979:
How much stronger have your Pokémon
become?\f
Let me check ’em out, OK?\f
DP.549.0980:
Did you know, I was crowned the
champion of a swimsuit contest!\f
So now, I’m trying to win a title
at a Pokémon Contest!\f
DP.549.0982: I’ll need to rework my strategy!
DP.549.0983:
I became the champion of a swimsuit
contest... I’m a super-talented girl!\f
I’m challenging you so I can become
the champ of a Pokémon Contest!\f
DP.549.0984:
My favorite kind of guy is someone
that looks good out on the open sea!\f
DP.549.0986:
...Though there’s a mysterious nature
that surrounds a mountain man...
DP.549.0987:
Hello again! You’re that Trainer who
looks keen with your Pokémon!\f
DP.549.0988:
Fine, all righty then.
Just a quick battle on my break!\f
DP.549.0990:
I’d better get on back to work...\f
You know, I’d rather be traveling
around with Pokémon the way you do.
DP.549.0991:
I’m gonna let you in on a secret...
I snuck my Pokémon to work!\f
DP.549.0993:
OK, OK, time for work! I’ll work up
a thirst with my Pokémon!
DP.549.1006:
What’s cool, you might ask? No?
I’ll tell you anyway: bug Pokémon!\f
DP.549.1007:
It bugs me when people ignore the
awesome coolness of bug Pokémon!
DP.549.1008:
It would seem that coolness alone
doesn’t add up to any wins...
DP.549.1011:
Did you know? “Swarm” is the name
of a Pokémon ability.
DP.549.1012:
My senses tingle...
I’ve spotted a rare Pokémon!\f
DP.549.1014:
I thought it was a rare Pokémon, but
it turned out to be just a Trainer!
DP.549.1015: We’re just out on a power walk!\f
DP.549.1017:
Eewww, nasty! There are only bug
Pokémon in the forest...\f
I also forgot to buy some Antidotes.
It’s just the worst thing ever!
DP.549.1018:
When a Trainer and a Pokémon bond
as one, a wondrous power is born...\f
DP.549.1020:
There still remain many mysteries yet
to be solved in this strange world...
DP.549.1021:
A strange presence has been felt...
It is emanating from...you!\f
DP.549.1022: Oh! Be one with me, my MEDITITE!
DP.549.1023:
The Old Chateau... I sense...
a particularly strong presence there.
DP.549.1024:
I see it...
I see it...\f
I see you going down in defeat...\f
DP.549.1025: It is I that has gone down in defeat.
DP.549.1026:
The Old Chateau...lies abandoned,
with none living in its walls...\f
And yet, and yet, there permeates a
presence...
DP.549.1027:
This forest is strange, you know...
It seems to fill me with energy...\f
DP.549.1028:
Your victory...
There is nothing strange about it.
DP.549.1029:
Forests are mystifying... They seem
to gather such unexplainable energy.
DP.549.1091:
You... One look at you tells me
you’re a real contender!\f
DP.549.1092: You’re as tough as you look.
DP.549.1093:
One day, people will run to the other
side of the road when I walk by ’em.\f
It’s a goal of mine I’m working on.
DP.549.1094:
Victory Road... Somehow, it feels as
if my journey is now coming to an end.\f
But, before the final chapter is
written, I must pen your defeat!\f
DP.549.1095:
That wasn’t how I planned the final
chapter to go in my writing class...
DP.549.1096:
If you don’t give up, you can reach
your goal.\f
That perseverance is what’s important
to Trainers. That’s in my book, too.
DP.549.1097:
Show me how you’ve battled to get
here! Let’s do this!\f
DP.549.1099:
Once you emerge from Victory Road,
the Pokémon League lies directly\r
ahead...\f
But many Trainers fail to ever find
their way on Victory Road...
DP.549.1100:
This total stranger’ll be a good way
to see if I have what it takes to own\r
the Pokémon League’s Elite Four!\f
DP.549.1101:
That battle just now must make you
tougher than everyone in the world.
DP.549.1102:
It doesn’t appear as if anyone could
even try to stand against your might.\f
The Elite Four should just surrender.
DP.549.1103:
I can sense that your Pokémon have
a lot of trust in you.\f
You and your Pokémon...
You seem to be aglow.\f
DP.549.1105: You blaze with so much vitality!
DP.549.1106:
Let me take a measure of how much
you have raised your Pokémon!\f
DP.549.1108:
Rather than navigating Victory Road,
I have a much better time putting\r
young Trainers like you to the test.
DP.549.1109:
I’m making an already-strong Pokémon
grow even stronger.\f
I’ll need your help with this!\f
DP.549.1110: There’s no way I could have won!
DP.549.1111:
Now how am I gonna teach it the most
powerful dragon moves...? Well?
DP.549.1112:
Top-level Trainers gather around this
place naturally.\f
I’d go so far as to call it the ideal
place to train with the best!\f
DP.549.1113:
That’s why I like it here; I get to
battle tough characters like you.
DP.549.1114:
When two roads diverge, you must
choose the path less traveled...
DP.549.1115:
My Pokémon knows karate!
I’m warning you, it’s a tough one!\f
DP.549.1116: I’ve met my match in strength!
DP.549.1117:
I’ve made it this far in life using the
karate I learned on the Internet!
DP.549.1118:
I keep battling so I can soar
ever higher into the skies!\f
DP.549.1120:
The wings of freedom...\f
I know I’ll find them if I can win
my way through the Pokémon League...
DP.549.1121:
Be warned, mortal!
I can see the future!\f
DP.549.1122:
So be it! I will now divulge what
I know of your future... Hmm!
DP.549.1123:
In the Pokémon League ahead, the
Elite Four await you!\f
But, you knew that already.
DP.549.1125: There’s just so much in your past...
DP.549.1126:
Did you...
Did you meet a legendary Pokémon?\f
No. That can’t be right...
DP.549.1127:
Pat: It’s a doubles team of aces!
We’re gonna overwhelm you!\f
DP.549.1128:
Pat: You and your Pokémon will gain
power by helping each other out.
DP.549.1129:
Pat: The combination of you and
your awesome Pokémon...\f
It’s the ultimate tag team!
DP.549.1130:
Pat: If you don’t mind, we’re hoping
for some two-on-two battle action.
DP.549.1131:
Jo: We form a combination that’s
in perfect sync!\f
How do you expect to counter that?\f
DP.549.1132:
Jo: You and your Pokémon make
a beautiful combination!
DP.549.1133:
Jo: Yup, the way you battle is
fantastic!\f
You should try to take the Elite Four
right now--not later!
DP.549.1134:
Jo: We want to have a battle
without an advantage.\f
Please come back when you have
at least two Pokémon!
DP.549.1135:
Al: I intend to perfect my Double
Battle technique.\f
That will make me better all around.\f
DP.549.1136:
Al: You! You’re an expert
double battler, too!
DP.549.1137:
Al: Your mastery over several
Pokémon at once...\f
You’re a remarkable Trainer!
DP.549.1138:
Al: You have but one Pokémon?\f
I would say that you are taking
Victory Road too lightly, kid.
DP.549.1139:
Kay: I want to improve my doubles
technique as much as I can.\f
That will improve me as a Trainer.\f
DP.549.1140:
Kay: My goodness!
You’re great at doubles, too!
DP.549.1141:
Kay: Depending on the combinations,
every kind of Pokémon can excel.\f
At least, that’s what I think.
DP.549.1142:
Kay: You’re really going through
Victory Road with only one Pokémon?
DP.549.1143:
We Trainers will accept challenges
anywhere! It’s what we do.\f
DP.549.1145:
Gee... When you’re in a cave, wild
Pokémon can appear anytime!
DP.549.1146:
To celebrate my getting through this
cave, I’m going to battle you!\f
DP.549.1147:
Well, I guess losing is something
to commemorate, too...
DP.549.1148:
Getting through that cave feels
like an adventure.
DP.549.1149:
I’m a Veteran, yes, but don’t you
dare treat me like a senior citizen!\f
DP.549.1150:
Hnuuurgh...
So much skill for one so young!
DP.549.1151:
I’ll always remain young at heart.
Never let them say you’re too old!
DP.549.1161:
Oh, what’s this? My last one!
This is where we make our stand!\f
DP.549.1162:
We’re not done yet!
There’s no giving up!
DP.549.1164:
Aiyaah! We’re coming out swinging
with super-heavy judo chops!\f
DP.549.1166:
I must rededicate myself to training.
The road extends into infinity...
DP.549.1167:
Up and down you go on the lifts.
Me? I like to battle!\f
DP.549.1169:
I can’t keep this up!
I’ll go back to working on the lifts.
DP.549.1170:
A Pokémon Gym isn’t only about seeing
how tough your Pokémon happen to be.\f
It’s so much deeper than just that.
It’s a test of you as a person.\f
DP.549.1172:
I get to work all day with my
Pokémon, and even battle sometimes.\f
I get all the fun I need every day!
DP.549.1173:
An ace has the knowledge and
experience of battling at high levels.\f
I’ll demonstrate what that means to
a noob like you!\f
DP.549.1174:
Wow...
I’m in the mood to sing a lullaby...
DP.549.1175:
Your earnest enthusiasm...
I guess that kinda makes you an ace.\f
Maybe you’re a Trainer who has the
potential to surpass aces!
DP.549.1176:
By focusing on only one type, you can
really see the strengths and\r
weaknesses of that Pokémon.\f
DP.549.1177: My focus was too narrow minded...
DP.549.1178:
Start by becoming friendly with your
Pokémon. I mean really friendly.\f
If you do that, you’ll learn naturally
how you should battle with it.
DP.549.1179:
Steel represents an unbending spirit!\f
If one refuses to accept defeat,
the path to victory reveals itself!\f
DP.549.1180:
I never gave up, but still I failed to
win...
DP.549.1181:
If you give up, well, that’s when
everything ends for you!
DP.549.1182:
Pokémon and people have worked
together for many years.\f
Let us show you an example of that
history!\f
DP.549.1183:
A spectacular loss!
But it’s still a loss!
DP.549.1184:
The way you helped each other...
That is what made you prevail!
DP.549.1185:
What do you think you’re doing to my
Pokémon?!
DP.549.1186:
This can’t be?! I lost?!
You...you uppity brat!
DP.549.1187:
I ain’t fooling around, kid.
This is how a professional does it!\f
DP.549.1188:
You messed up my job...
Now I’m not gonna get a bonus...
DP.549.1189:
I hear they’re going to do something
with electricity, I think.
DP.549.1190:
Collecting electricity from the Valley
Windworks... That’s our mission.\f
DP.549.1191:
I really don’t like kids who also
happen to be tough Trainers...
DP.549.1192:
You don’t have an inkling of what
Team Galactic is trying to achieve!\f
Of course, they don’t tell a grunt
like me anything, either... But still!
DP.549.1193:
...This is why I’m gonna be stuck as
a grunt forever...
DP.549.1194:
...If only I had some decent
Pokémon...
DP.549.1195:
Don’t get cocky, kid!
This isn’t over yet!
DP.549.1196:
My Pokémon’s HP is low...
This could be a close fight.
DP.549.1198:
Don’t get cocky, kid!
This isn’t over yet!
DP.549.1199:
My Pokémon’s HP is low...
This could be a close fight.
DP.549.1201:
We were having a heated discussion
over Pokémon the way Collectors do.\f
DP.549.1202:
Knowledge alone isn’t everything,
you know...
DP.549.1203:
I’m more knowledgeable than the
rest when it comes to collecting.\f
I have rare Pokémon!\f
But a Collector doesn’t make a good
battler necessarily...
DP.549.1204:
I’m a Collector, and I’m proud of
what I know about Pokémon.\f
Would you like me to test your
knowledge?\f
DP.549.1205:
That’s some knowledge you have
there!
DP.549.1206:
I don’t like people who are more
knowledgeable than me! Go away!
DP.549.1207:
Welcome!
This place is my pride and joy!\f
DP.549.1208:
I take losses with an unusually big
smile! Do you find that odd at all?
DP.549.1209:
After a match, you should have some
Moomoo Milk to quench your thirst!\f
Just chug it right down! Glug glug!
DP.549.1226:
Are you saying something?
You think you have me cornered?
DP.549.1227:
Amazing!
You’re very good, aren’t you?
DP.549.1228:
Giggle! You found me!
Of course, let’s battle!\f
DP.549.1229:
Aww, boo!
Look, you’ve beaten me!
DP.549.1230:
Giggle! There’s only our Gym Leader
left. Go on, don’t be afraid!
DP.549.1231:
A forest inside a Gym...
Shocking, isn’t it?\f
DP.549.1232:
I was going to beat you while you
were still in a state of shock...
DP.549.1233:
OK, the next Trainer is at the end,
past two boulders.
DP.549.1234:
My Grass-type Pokémon can dole out
special attacks...\f
I won’t let you win easily!\f
DP.549.1235:
The more beautiful a flower,
the faster it withers...
DP.549.1236:
Oh, that’s right...
A hint about the next Trainer...\f
In the middle of three trees.
That’s my hint. Good luck.
DP.549.1237:
Even concealed, there is no hiding
the aroma of flowers.\f
DP.549.1238:
Just like your inability to conceal
your abundant skill.
DP.549.1239:
Your next opponent is under four
flowers.
DP.549.1240:
Hey! That there!
That was a good move!
DP.549.1241: This is where it gets exciting!
DP.549.1242:
Hunwah!
It’s gone and ended!\f
How will I say this... I want more!
I wanted to battle a lot more!
DP.549.1243:
I’ve landed the most fish Pokémon
in the world. I’m next!\f
DP.549.1244:
Being number one in the world doesn’t
mean a thing...
DP.549.1245:
I figure I got too wrapped up in
fishing and neglected training.
DP.549.1246:
I have mastery over the incredible
power of water. You won’t win!\f
DP.549.1247:
But the kid wins anyway!
I’m just bowled over!
DP.549.1248:
The water rising and falling is tricky,
but don’t let it annoy you.\f
If you lose sight of yourself, that’s
when you’re set to lose.
DP.549.1249:
I’ve traveled all over the globe
while raising Pokémon.\f
This is the Gym I’ve chosen.
You’ll find it a handful for sure!\f
DP.549.1250:
You!
You’re a kind of top-class tough!
DP.549.1251:
If you were to go around the world,
I’m sure you’d meet tougher Pokémon.
DP.549.1252:
Like the raging sea, I crash down
and wash away everything before me!\f
That’s just how I roll!\f
DP.549.1253:
That wave didn’t even wash
my hands...
DP.549.1254:
I’m now becalmed like a waveless
sea...
DP.549.1255:
My body isn’t the only thing I
work on toughening up here.\f
I also work on my Pokémon and my
spirit!\f
DP.549.1256:
Wow, Trainer! You just might be
tougher than our Gym Leader!
DP.549.1257:
Maybe I’ll do like Wake,\f
I mean, Crasher Wake, and wear
the same kind of mask.
DP.549.1258:
I want to become a strong Trainer
like Crasher Wake!\f
DP.549.1260:
Maybe I’ll do like Wake,\f
I mean, Crasher Wake, and use
the same kinds of Pokémon.
DP.549.1273:
Oh!
But this isn’t the end, my friend!
DP.549.1274: I’m in a bit of a bind, aren’t I?
DP.549.1275:
I shall admit defeat...
You are much too strong.
DP.549.1276:
We’re the Karate Quads!\f
I will strike a blow for love with my
fist! Hiyah, looooooooove!\f
DP.549.1278:
Your Pokémon sure are tough!\f
But our Gym Leader Maylene will
break you like a stack of bricks!
DP.549.1279:
We’re the Karate Quads!\f
I will strike a blow for courage with
my fist! Hiyah, couraaaaaaaaaaage!\f
DP.549.1280: I couldn’t force my way to victory...
DP.549.1281:
To overwhelm by force...
That is my ideal beat-down style.\f
It doesn’t seem to work that way
with Pokémon, however.
DP.549.1282:
We’re the Karate Quads!\f
I will strike a blow for hope with my
fist! Hiyah, hoooooooooooooope!\f
DP.549.1283: We came up short, but not by much.
DP.549.1284:
I’ll have to redo my training, though.
Maylene’s gonna trample me again...
DP.549.1285:
We’re the Karate Quads!\f
I will strike a blow for tears with
my fist! Hiyah, teeeeeeaaaaaaaaars!\f
DP.549.1286:
I’m so hungry, kid...
I don’t have any strength left...
DP.549.1287:
I lost because I didn’t eat
enough pizza.\f
...No. Anything I say will sound
like I’m making excuses.
DP.549.1288:
Oh, heavens. What is this?
Is this my final Pokémon?
DP.549.1290:
You are so fantastically strong.
I know now why I have lost.
DP.549.1291:
I’ve been to all sorts of places.
That means I know tons of things!\f
DP.549.1292:
Yeah, whatever.
You can battle, too...
DP.549.1293:
I’m gonna visit new places and find
new Pokémon so I’ll be a know-it-all!
DP.549.1294:
Seriously, kid, why don’t you answer
the quiz properly?\f
You could get to the Gym Leader
without a problem! Waste of my time.\r
Now I gotta knock you around a bit.\f
DP.549.1295:
I kinda deserved that, didn’t I?
I gotta stop mouthing off like that...
DP.549.1296:
I’ll remember you and your shifty
Pokémon, too. I’m watching you...
DP.549.1297:
Ooh, ooh! You want to battle me?
OK then, I’ll do the best I can!\f
DP.549.1298:
I squeezed out all my power...
You’re one impressive challenger.
DP.549.1299:
Look at it this way: you can learn
something from every battle.
DP.549.1300:
Ehehe! You threw the quiz so you’d
get to battle with me, right?\f
DP.549.1301:
Don’t you know how to take it easy
or anything? Geesh!
DP.549.1302:
Since you’re here, you might as well
take on every Trainer.
DP.549.1303:
I’m not afraid of picnicking anywhere,
so I’ve learned all sorts of things.\f
DP.549.1304:
Your toughness...
It’s something new to me.
DP.549.1305:
I’ve learned that Pokémon are fun
’cause everyone plays with ’em!
DP.549.1306:
I study subjects like Pokémon and
history...\f
You know, all the important things!\f
DP.549.1307:
Oh, what in the...?
I didn’t study enough?
DP.549.1308:
You won because of Pokémon type
matchups, cool tactics...\f
You know, all sorts of reasons!
DP.549.1309:
I’ve probably studied more about
Pokémon than you.\f
DP.549.1310:
Oh, you!
I feel bad that I’m so angry!
DP.549.1311:
I’m going over the reasons why I
lost. That way, I’ll win next time.
DP.549.1312:
Don’t you have a Pokétch?
Or did you screw up deliberately?\f
DP.549.1314:
You’ll have to turn back, though.
This is a dead end.
DP.549.1315:
I’m going to break the ice and bring
out my last-resort Pokémon!
DP.549.1316:
I can sense your will to win, but I
promise you I’m not about to lose!
DP.549.1317:
I must say, I’ve warmed up to you!
I might even admire you a little.
DP.549.1318:
...It’s t-too cold.
I can’t even feel my t-tongue.\f
DP.549.1320:
The higher up you slide from, the
more speed you’ll have to smash\r
those big snowballs.
DP.549.1321:
My willpower was shaped and tempered
by howling blizzards.\f
I’ll bring it to bear on you!\f
DP.549.1323:
I’ve battled countless Trainers
and many more Pokémon still.\f
My spirit has been hardened from all
the battles I have fared.
DP.549.1324:
Is the Gym’s trick floor making you
a little hot under the collar?\f
If you can’t maintain your cool in
battle, you’ll freeze up.\f
DP.549.1325:
You were surprisingly cool...
At least I have my warm boots.
DP.549.1326:
Your Pokémon look so hot in battle.
So hot, they’re cool! Hahah!
DP.549.1327:
Are you feeling the chill of fatigue?\f
A good Trainer goes for the win no
matter what their condition is!\f
DP.549.1328:
That’s right. A good Trainer will win,
no matter what the situation may be.
DP.549.1329:
The Trainer’s feelings...
The Pokémon’s feelings...\f
If they are one and the same, you
will never lose.
DP.549.1336:
Here it comes!
Get ready for my trump card!
DP.549.1337: Shocking... I didn’t see this coming!
DP.549.1338:
You’ve got me beat...\f
Your desire and the noble way
your Pokémon battled for you...\f
I even felt thrilled during our
match.\f
That was a very good battle.
DP.549.1339:
Wow! I’m surprised you’ve come this
far, but you’ll have to turn back.\f
There isn’t any chance that you
could ever beat me!\f
DP.549.1340:
What makes your Pokémon
so special?
DP.549.1341:
As a challenger, you’re one tough
Trainer.
DP.549.1342:
I’m not just looking for tough
Trainers to battle.\f
I’ve been battling here because
I want to feel the rush!\f
DP.549.1343:
Your power is thrilling...
I’m thrilled down to my toes!
DP.549.1344:
I’m so glad that there are Pokémon!\f
There isn’t much else that gives me
the thrill that Pokémon do!
DP.549.1345:
I want to win! I channel that desire
through my guitar!\f
I want to win! That desire makes
my Pokémon a star!\f
DP.549.1346:
We couldn’t win...
No encores for us...
DP.549.1347:
The Trainer’s desire to win!\f
If you don’t lose that, there’s
no limit on what you can become!
DP.549.1348:
Spark!\f
This is what our Gym Leader did
to the Gym out of boredom!\f
DP.549.1350:
We were lacking energy...\f
No, we lacked more than that. We
didn’t want the win enough.
DP.549.1351:
Whether you’re a Trainer or a
Guitarist, it takes dedication to\r
improve your mad skills!\f
DP.549.1352:
My skills seem to have let me down.
I must have been out of tune!
DP.549.1353:
The way you battle, I can feel the
very heart of rock and roll.\f
Tell me, are you maybe a fan of
rocking out?
DP.549.1354:
Look at the way I’m dressed.
Can’t you see that I’m hardcore?\f
DP.549.1355:
I was being serious!
Don’t laugh at me! I mean it!
DP.549.1356:
I dress this way so I can learn to
think like an electric Pokémon.\f
Why don’t you give it a try?
DP.549.1357:
This is the toughest Gym in Sinnoh.\f
That’s why I’m here--to learn the
best battle techniques around!\f
DP.549.1359:
You just showed me that there’s
still lots I need to learn.\f
The world of Pokémon is deep!
DP.549.1360:
Can you make it to the Gym Leader?
You sure now?\f
DP.549.1361:
The gears spin round and round...
I spin down and out...
DP.549.1362:
Our Gym’s trick walkways are sure
to make your head spin!
DP.549.1363:
My dragon Pokémon chose to become
powerful here. They sure like it!\f
DP.549.1365:
It’s been several years since I left
the Dragon’s Den.\f
I’ve got to say, your Pokémon are
in the top class for toughness.
DP.549.1366:
My dragon Pokémon chose to remain
here to become powerful.\f
DP.549.1367:
There’s something about you...
You’re not just anybody.\f
I challenge you!\f
DP.549.1368:
You’re at a different level of
expertise for sure!
DP.549.1369:
You’ve won countless times...
That has made you very powerful.
DP.549.1370:
There’s something about you...
You still remain extraordinary.\f
I challenge you again!\f
DP.549.1371:
I constantly analyze Pokémon and
various battles on my laptop.\f
DP.549.1372:
...Things don’t always work out
according to my calculations...
DP.549.1373:
I had a lot of fun battling with
you, though.\f
I wonder if I can analyze the
battle data properly?\f
I could use a rematch to get
some additional data.
DP.549.1374:
I analyzed our last battle on my
laptop.\f
DP.549.1375:
For some reason I was drawn here,
and it is here that I met you...\f
I want to know what all this means!\f
DP.549.1376:
I see...\f
So that’s what it means...
DP.549.1377:
I feel... I feel some sort of a mystic
presence emanating from here...
DP.549.1378:
Why have you come back to this spot?
I want to know what all this means!\f
DP.549.1379:
There is nothing here... And yet
there is a power lurking...\f
Were you drawn by it, as well?\f
DP.549.1380:
The power that slumbers within you...
It is rather marvelous indeed...
DP.549.1381:
A place where nothing else exists...\f
A place such as that is better suited
to awaken the power within.
DP.549.1382:
Do you see now?
You’ve come back again.\f
There must be something that draws
you to this place...\f
DP.549.1383:
I don’t care who you are--no one
interferes with my treasure hunting!\f
DP.549.1385:
I heard there’s an intriguing stone
monument around, so I came running.
DP.549.1386:
I’m still here...and still searching
for treasures.\f
However, a battle with you
is a treasure I can’t pass up!\f
DP.549.1387:
A man standing alone, I face the sea
and train.\f
These fists were hewn in that way!\f
DP.549.1388:
My training and my fists weren’t
enough to defeat you!
DP.549.1389:
Argh! Instead of training myself,
I should have trained my Pokémon!\f
All I’ve been doing for the last year
is staring out over the sea!
DP.549.1390:
Ah, it’s been a long time!\f
I have been toughening my fists
against the sea, just as before!\f
DP.549.1391:
I’ve seen countless Trainers and
even more Pokémon!\f
So, what kind of a Trainer are you?\f
DP.549.1393:
I’ve seen countless Trainers and
even more Pokémon.\f
You’re a strong Trainer.
Moreover, your heart is strong.
DP.549.1394:
I am indeed a Veteran, but I don’t
use that as an excuse to slack off.\f
I take pride in challenging those
who have bested me before!\f
DP.549.1395:
Oh snap!
That’s how it is, then?
DP.549.1396:
I like to study a lot...
I thought I could win...
DP.549.1397:
If you can beat me, I’ll let you join
my fan club so you can adore me!\f
DP.549.1398:
Ouch! Are you one of those crazy
fans? You sure are rowdy!
DP.549.1399:
Well, that’s me and my Pokémon!
Thank you for being such a fan!\f
Just so you know, our latest single
is “Pokémon for World Peace”!
DP.549.1400:
I’ve spotted a charismatic Trainer!
We just might have a scoop here!\f
DP.549.1401:
My camera’s too heavy.
I couldn’t battle effectively...
DP.549.1402:
The lively expressions on you and
your Pokémon’s faces...\f
It sure makes for some great TV!
DP.549.1403:
Your spirit’s vibes, man... I can feel
that you’ve got rock in your soul!\f
DP.549.1404:
You beat me, man, but...
I feel totally amped to jam harder!
DP.549.1405:
Rock is about your spirit!
Battling is about spirit, too!\r
That’s why battles rock! Rawk!
DP.549.1406:
You’re live on camera, but try
to act natural, OK?\f
DP.549.1407:
The camera is our witness!
It’s recorded our defeat...
DP.549.1408:
