I’d like to take that footage and
have it broadcast worldwide.
DP.549.1409:
Two Pokémon! If you had two Pokémon,
we’d have a great scene to shoot!
DP.549.1410:
So, let’s begin and find out what
sort of a Trainer you are!\f
DP.549.1411:
You have a superstar quality!
You sure could become a celebrity!
DP.549.1412:
I lost, but I’m totally thrilled!
We just made some great TV!
DP.549.1413:
Oh, no. What we’re looking for is you
in action with two Pokémon!
DP.549.1414:
Are we all ready to have some fun?
I sure am! Aren’t you having fun?!\r
Let’s make it fun! OK?! Mwahahah!\f
DP.549.1416:
A clown’s makeup is a face that’s
crying while laughing. Mwahahah!\f
It defines what we do!
DP.549.1417:
Po-Po-Pokémon!
Do you think I’m a real Pokémon?\f
DP.549.1419:
I need to find a way to get more into
the character of a Pokémon...
DP.549.1420:
Join me in this on-the-spot report,
live at the scene of a battle!\f
DP.549.1422:
Interviews are about taking the
initiative. The people need to know.
DP.549.1423:
How is this madness possible?
The two of us, losing to children?
DP.549.1424:
This won’t do... Time to retreat.
This mission is a failure.
DP.549.1425:
How insolent.
Take a bite of this, child!
DP.549.1426:
Losing to some child...
Being careless cost me too much.
DP.549.1427:
We are gathering Pokémon for
an astonishing undertaking!\f
Your meddling won’t be tolerated!\f
DP.549.1428: I feel like I got meddled with...
DP.549.1429:
Our astonishing undertaking is
most certainly breathtaking.\f
If you ever hope to see its glorious
unveiling, then don’t meddle with us!
DP.549.1433:
Our objectives are incredible!
Too incredible for me to understand!\f
I’ll fight blindly to defend them,
and your intrusion won’t be forgiven!\f
DP.549.1434: What was I fighting for, again?
DP.549.1435:
What do you have against taking
Pokémon from others?\f
Look in any field or forest!
Those things aren’t exactly rare!
DP.549.1439:
Sorry, deary! Team Galactic doesn’t
accept children as members!\f
DP.549.1440: B-but, deary, you’re just a kid!
DP.549.1441:
You wanted to go up?
Well, why didn’t you?
DP.549.1442:
Let’s see how good this Pokémon is!
I stole it from some weak Trainer.\f
DP.549.1444:
Wimpy little Pokémon...\f
When I get promoted, I’ll demand
better stolen Pokémon.
DP.549.1445:
Why, thank you!\f
We love it when people come to us
to donate their Pokémon!\f
DP.549.1446: What do you think you’re doing?!
DP.549.1447:
You can catch Pokémon anywhere.
What’s so special about them?\f
Trainers that lose theirs should
quit whining and catch some more!
DP.549.1451:
This place is teeming with UNOWN...
There has to be some meaning to this.\f
The truth is out there...
I’ll start my search by battling you!\f
DP.549.1453:
I give up. I’m not going to rack my
brain over the meaning of this place.
DP.549.1454:
I can’t explain it...
Being here compels me to battle!\f
DP.549.1455:
Hunh?!
What was I just doing?!
DP.549.1456:
Though they are gone, their desire
to battle lives on?\f
The spirits of Pokémon still linger?
Is that what it is?
DP.549.1457:
I need to shake off my sorrow...
Please, battle with me!\f
DP.549.1459:
I won’t ever forget the time I spent
with my Pokémon...\f
Not even for a moment.
DP.549.1460:
It makes no difference where we are.\f
If you have Pokémon with you,
I reckon you ought to battle.\f
DP.549.1461:
You’ve got a lot of giddyap and go
in you!
DP.549.1462:
Over a long life, you’ll be certain
to have some sad farewells.\f
But I reckon there are also some
new beginnings.
DP.549.1463:
Hahaha! I’m afraid y’all are no match
for us with jus’ one of them Pokémon!
DP.549.1464:
My Pokémon is a lively one.
Lemme show you how much!\f
DP.549.1465: Well! Aren’t you the lively one!
DP.549.1466:
Them graves here in Lost Tower...
Right’n here, inside my heart...\f
Those are the places where my
Pokémon remain...
DP.549.1467:
You haven’t got yerself two
Pokémon?
DP.549.1468:
My Pokémon were taken from me...
Team Galactic did it...\f
Ever since, I’ve never forgiven
their faces...\f
DP.549.1470:
I’m not doing my Pokémon any favors
by ruining its memory like this...\f
I can’t be wallowing around forever.
I gotta move on and turn the page.
DP.549.1471:
Mike: I can’t embarrass myself again.
Not in front of my girlfriend!\f
DP.549.1472:
Mike: Awww, jeez.
Man, that’s a downer...
DP.549.1473:
Mike: Coming here again brings back
all kinds of memories of me and Nat.
DP.549.1474:
Mike: You can’t battle with us.
Not with one Pokémon, anyway.
DP.549.1475:
Nat: I don’t want to look bad again.
Not when my boyfriend is watching!\f
DP.549.1476:
Nat: This makes me feel hollow
inside... Oh, so hollow...
DP.549.1477:
Nat: The Pokémon that brought me and
Mike together is buried here...
DP.549.1478:
Nat: You do have at least two
Pokémon, don’t you?
DP.549.1479:
Waah! Ghost! Get away! Eek!
Help me, team!\f
DP.549.1481:
I had to come here because I lost
a dare with some kids at school.\f
The loser had to go to the top and
bring back an HM...
DP.549.1482:
Beating you would be my 100th
straight win! Here’s to a fun battle!\f
DP.549.1483:
You don’t know how frustrating it is
to lose now, after all that work!
DP.549.1484:
I wish I could beat Maylene in
Veilstone City one day...
DP.549.1485:
Yeah, I like to camp! So what?
Let’s battle!\f
DP.549.1486:
I should’ve just stuck to
camping out here...
DP.549.1487:
When I’m with my Pokémon, I can camp
just about anywhere I want!
DP.549.1488:
If we battle here, your Pokémon will
become stronger, and so will mine.\f
That’s a good thing for both of us.
What’s not to like? Let’s throw down!\f
DP.549.1489:
You know, I would have really enjoyed
a win there. Would’ve been real nice.
DP.549.1490:
This mine’s been abandoned, but
now it’s home to many Pokémon.\f
I guess everything finds a place
to call home someday...
DP.549.1491:
Tough Pokémon...
Tough Trainers...\f
You tell me, where else can I find
a place as good as this to train?\f
DP.549.1492:
That was good.
You’ve bonded well with your Pokémon.
DP.549.1493:
Tough Pokémon...
Tough Trainers...\f
A strong spirit and a tight bond...
There is so much to train for.
DP.549.1494:
I’ll pound the fear of my fists into
you all karate style, punk!\f
DP.549.1495:
I’m so sorry...
I got a bit mouthy there, didn’t I?
DP.549.1496:
So, I’m gonna try and shatter steel!\f
I wonder how many more years it
would take for me to do that?
DP.549.1497:
Every good Hiker gets a boost of
energy when surrounded by boulders!\f
Wrooooar! Coming at you!
Let me blow off some steam!\f
DP.549.1498:
Whew... Crazy, delicious sugar!
I think I’ve calmed down now...
DP.549.1499:
If it’s called a mountain, you can
be sure I’ll be climbing it.\f
Even if it’s a mountain of food, I’ll
still be stickin’ my flag on top!
DP.549.1500:
When you’re up in the mountains,
a battle’d do for a proper greeting!\f
DP.549.1502:
Actually, when you’re up in the
mountains, a simple hi’d do if\r
you walk past someone.\f
Oh, and this isn’t the mountains.
DP.549.1503:
May we have a battle, please?\f
It will be something to lighten up this
boring picnic with.\f
DP.549.1504:
We’re not going to win if we play
around like that...
DP.549.1505:
I’m going home to play with my
Pokémon!
DP.549.1508:
I used to work here a long time
ago, before it shut down.\f
I worked at the ironworks near
Floaroma Town, too.\f
You might say I’m drawn by iron
as if by magnet!
DP.549.1509:
While I’m making sure the lifts are
safe, I’ll focus on a battle with you!\f
DP.549.1510:
A-OK! Looks safe to me!
Not a problem in sight!
DP.549.1511:
I routinely check the lifts here.
You can be sure of their safety!
DP.549.1512:
Hey! This is no playground!
If you’re gonna play, battle me!\f
DP.549.1513: You played me like an amateur!
DP.549.1514:
They were going to close this place
up so no one could get in.\f
But, they left it open so people and
Pokémon can get together here.
DP.549.1515:
The Canalave Gym folks use this place
as their training grounds.\f
DP.549.1516:
Maybe I should head to the Gym and
work out there...
DP.549.1517:
Roark spent his childhood playing
here, I think...
DP.549.1518:
Humph! You’re lost, aren’t you?
I’ll guide you if you can beat me.\f
DP.549.1519: I said I’m going to win!
DP.549.1520:
I’m not lost, I tell you!
I’m camping! That’s my story!
DP.549.1521:
Huh? Are you lost too?
No? It doesn’t matter.\r
Let’s have a quick Pokémon battle!\f
DP.549.1522:
Not fair!
We’re not on the same level!
DP.549.1523:
I got separated from my friends...\f
I’ve got my Pokémon with me, so I’m
OK, but...
DP.549.1524:
You look like you might just have
the Pokémon I’ve been looking for!\f
DP.549.1525:
You didn’t have a single Pokémon
I wanted... You’re no Collector!
DP.549.1526:
I’m very picky, so I want to collect
every Pokémon without anyone’s help.\f
...I do have friends, though.
No, seriously! I do!
DP.549.1527:
In deep tunnels and caves, there’re
a couple things you’re sure to see.\f
ZUBAT and Ruin Maniacs!\f
DP.549.1529:
I’ve scoured every inch of this
place... Most of it while I was lost.\f
Anyway, if there’s one thing I can
say, this place can’t be called ruins!
DP.549.1530:
Hush now, lost little Pokémon, don’t
you cry.\f
I’m here to take care of you!\f
DP.549.1532:
Speaking of crying, I’m positive I
heard crying from deeper in the cave.
DP.549.1533: Look! A Trainer lost in Wayward Cave!\f
DP.549.1534: I strayed from the battle plan!
DP.549.1535:
Me? No, I’m not lost.
I live here!
DP.549.1536:
Wandering around, I got hungry, so
I ate some wild mushrooms...\f
They gave me gas, and now I can’t
stop burping! Bluurrf!\f
DP.549.1537:
Bleff! Hurk!
I think...I’m getting better...
DP.549.1538:
I hear there’s a Pokémon that has
mushrooms growing on its back.\f
Not around here, somewhere far away.
I wonder if they taste any good?
DP.549.1539:
Where am I? Am I lost? Who are you?
Are you a Pokémon Trainer?\f
DP.549.1540:
OK, so we’re both Trainers.
That’s a start, right?
DP.549.1541:
I just wanted to have a picnic under
the Cycling Road.\f
I didn’t think I would get lost
in a place like this...
DP.549.1542:
What every good picnic needs is a
cute setting, good food, and a fun\r
battle!\f
DP.549.1543: That wasn’t any fun for me!
DP.549.1544:
Why have a picnic here? I don’t know.
There’s no deep meaning to it.
DP.549.1545:
Did you come to play, too?
Wanna play battle with me?\f
DP.549.1546: You were just toying with me!
DP.549.1547:
I’m playing hide-and-seek here.
I like some underground tag, too.
DP.549.1548:
The sharp vision of my bird Pokémon
will see through your weaknesses!\f
DP.549.1549: Don’t you have an Achilles’ heel?
DP.549.1550:
I want to become stronger, but only
with my favorite Pokémon.
DP.549.1551:
Learning how to manage tough Pokémon
is the shortcut to getting tough.\f
DP.549.1552: I lost? But how is that possible?!
DP.549.1553:
Being able to manage any kind of
Pokémon...\f
I suppose that makes a good Trainer.
DP.549.1554:
Being this tough isn’t good enough.
You have to look cool while doing it.\f
Mastering that makes you an ace!\f
DP.549.1556:
I battled the best I could.
I wasn’t uncool in losing! ...Right?
DP.549.1557:
I want my Pokémon to get a taste of
the sweetness that is victory.\f
I can’t afford to lose this one!\f
DP.549.1558:
This defeat has the tang of my bitter
tears...
DP.549.1559:
I feel sorry for my hungry Pokémon...\f
Sorry, guys. I’ll get tougher so you
can feast on the taste of victory...
DP.549.1560:
I will win. I am sure of it.
Therefore, you will lose!\f
DP.549.1562:
You didn’t win!
I just lost!\f
Oh, whatever. It’s the same thing...
DP.549.1563:
Let me see what you got there, kid.
I could give you some advice.\f
DP.549.1565:
Well, I don’t have any advice for
someone as tough as you!
DP.549.1566:
Now we shall battle, and from it will
emerge one loser...\f
DP.549.1568:
I can use psychic powers, but
battling isn’t so simple...\f
It takes much more to win!
DP.549.1569:
A battle is a clash of willpower!\f
The one who wants the win the most
will emerge the victor!\f
DP.549.1570: But... I thought I could win!
DP.549.1571:
Psychic power...\f
It’s hard to put faith in something
that you can’t see...
DP.549.1572:
Allow me to demonstrate how a true
Psychic conducts a battle!\f
DP.549.1573:
Did I get to show you anything...?
Anything at all?
DP.549.1574:
How do I use my psychic powers?\f
I never use them for dishonest ends.
I also never do any good deeds...
DP.549.1575:
I see it!
I see a victory for me!\f
DP.549.1577:
Your efforts have altered the very
path of the future!
DP.549.1578:
I trained all of my gnarly Pokémon
at the Fighting Dojo in Kanto!\f
DP.549.1580:
We’re gonna go ahead and leave...
You know, go train elsewhere.
DP.549.1583:
I’ll forget that we lost!\f
...Wait, if I did that, we’d never
learn from our mistakes...
DP.549.1584:
What it means to battle...
Its joys, its sorrows...\r
I’ve experienced it all!\f
DP.549.1586:
You may be a child, but you’ve taught
me a whole lot. I thank you humbly.
DP.549.1587:
I’ll wheel out some wicked Pokémon
and even wickeder moves!\f
DP.549.1588:
All I can manage now is to wheeze
out a few meek sighs...
DP.549.1589:
I don’t see what my age has to do
with playing with Pokémon, frankly.
DP.549.1590:
I let my bird Pokémon carry me to
wherever. And so, here I am!\f
DP.549.1591:
Sheesh... I arrive in a new place, and
it turns out to be the Battle Zone...
DP.549.1592:
I was born in the Hoenn region.
I’ve only just recently flown here.
DP.549.1593:
I let my bird Pokémon do as they
wish. And so, we train here daily!\f
DP.549.1594:
My Pokémon grew up in the arms of
Mother Nature. They’re tough!\f
DP.549.1595:
How could you be tougher than
Mother Nature?
DP.549.1596:
Most of the time, my Pokémon return
to their Poké Balls right away.\f
But sometimes, they just fall asleep
on top of my head. That gets messy.
DP.549.1597:
The desire to win... That should be
evident in every Trainer!\f
DP.549.1598:
The potential of dragon Pokémon puts
them at the top of my list!\f
DP.549.1599: Potential doesn’t mean I can win...
DP.549.1600:
A Dragon Tamer Champion...\f
I’ll need to train so much more to
even come close to coming close...
DP.549.1601:
I’ve cranked up my dragon Pokémon’s
potential!\f
I’ve been looking forward to seeing
you again!\f
DP.549.1602:
What my Pokémon and I most want...
Victory!\f
DP.549.1604:
I don’t ever want to put my Pokémon
through that again...\f
It got humiliated because I wasn’t
good enough...
DP.549.1605:
You’ve beaten us once before, but we
won’t make the same mistake!\f
DP.549.1606:
Dragon Pokémon are sacred beings...
That’s what my master taught me.\f
And now I’ll prove it to you!\f
DP.549.1607:
Not good enough!
We’re still not strong enough!
DP.549.1608:
It’s not good enough for a Pokémon
to just be tough.\f
It’s not good enough for a Trainer
to just work hard.\f
Both have to grow together!
DP.549.1609:
This time!\f
I’ll show you how brilliantly I work
with my Pokémon partner!\f
DP.549.1610:
How do you do?
I’m a Dragon Tamer.\f
What say we compare our Pokémon
by means of a battle?\f
DP.549.1611:
Oops!
How very silly of me!
DP.549.1612:
Well, there seems to be an image
associated with Dragon Tamers.\f
But personally, I’m really laid back
and easygoing, you know?\f
I figure there’s a whole lot of other
things I need to worry about first.
DP.549.1613:
Heya, how do you do again?\f
What say we let our Pokémon duke it
out in another battle?\f
DP.549.1614:
There is something missing in the
way I battle...\f
I’ve come here to find it.\f
DP.549.1615:
I see it now...
I know what I lack.
DP.549.1616:
It’s been a privilege to have battled
with you.\f
I learned an invaluable lesson from
you today.
DP.549.1617:
Have you discovered what’s missing in
your battles? I have.\f
DP.549.1618:
I’ve got the urge to battle with you.
Hope you’re willing to oblige!\f
DP.549.1619:
I shouldn’t have paid attention
to my urge...
DP.549.1620:
So long as my partner’s alongside me,
I’m willing to take on the world!
DP.549.1621:
The urge to battle you again has
struck me. Want to humor me?\f
DP.549.1622:
Have you any knowledge of levels
or the stats of Pokémon? Well, I do!\f
DP.549.1623: Hmm. I like how you attack.
DP.549.1624:
Pokémon and numbers...
Who cares about that stuff?\f
Winning is what’s important.
Numbers aren’t everything.
DP.549.1625:
Pokémon battles aren’t decided by
numbers.\f
It’s the bond you share with your
Pokémon that decides outcomes!\f
DP.549.1627:
Did you enjoy the show?
Super fabulous, wasn’t it?
DP.549.1628:
I’ll be happy to battle you again!
Let’s battle again sometime, yeah?
DP.549.1629: Welcome to my new Pokémon show!\f
DP.549.1630:
My team’s been trained through
and through!\f
You’ll shake when you see how
tough they are!\f
DP.549.1632:
I fed my gang Protein, Carbos...
You name it, I pumped ’em full of it.
DP.549.1633:
Hey! You’re that Trainer who left
me all shook up! Uh-huh!\f
This time, it’s my turn to leave you
shaking all over!\f
DP.549.1634:
I’ve leveled my precious partner this
far. I’ll let you see it!\f
DP.549.1635: It needs to be leveled more?!
DP.549.1636:
My Pokémon...\f
It’s actually the very first friend
that I’ve ever had.
DP.549.1637:
...When I close my eyes, I’m taken
back to that time we lost to you.\f
My partner’s leveled since then.
I’ll prove it to you!\f
DP.549.1638:
Worthy opponents... The search for
them drives me to travel far.\f
DP.549.1639:
I’ve certainly found a tough
adversary in you...
DP.549.1640:
How much you believe in your
Pokémon...\f
That’s a critical factor in how a
battle will turn out.
DP.549.1641:
We’ve faced many challengers since
we met, but they were all weak...\f
I relish the tough resistance that
only you can provide!\f
DP.549.1644:
I feel invigorated from that battle,
even though we lost.\f
After all, we gave it everything we
had.
DP.549.1645:
Hello again! Please don’t hold
anything back--just like before.\f
DP.549.1646:
You’re willing to battle?
Let me see what you have?\f
DP.549.1647: Your love of Pokémon really shows!
DP.549.1648:
I grew up together with my team,
right from my childhood.\f
All our memories, we’ve always shared
them.
DP.549.1649:
Oh, hi, we meet again.\f
May I see what you’ve done with your
Pokémon?\f
DP.549.1650:
The world is huge, and there are
so many different Pokémon!\f
What kinds of Pokémon are with you?
Please, I want to have a look!\f
DP.549.1651:
Wow, there are Pokémon that
wonderful!
DP.549.1652:
There is always something to like
about any Pokémon.\f
It’s so hard to decide which ones
I should raise.
DP.549.1653:
If I’m having trouble deciding,
I go with my favorites!\f
DP.549.1654:
What sort of moves have you taught?
That tells me how good you are!\f
DP.549.1656:
I heard that somewhere there’s
someone who teaches Pokémon moves.
DP.549.1657:
Have you taught your team any new
moves since last time?\f
DP.549.1658:
When eyes meet...
That’s when a battle starts!\f
DP.549.1660:
I suddenly remembered what it was 
like when I had my first battle.\f
I wonder why that would be?
DP.549.1661:
When eyes meet...
That’s when a battle starts!\r
That’s what makes us Trainers!\f
DP.549.1662:
You’re going to win!
That’s the future I saw!\f
DP.549.1663:
What I saw in the future turned out
to be true...
DP.549.1664:
I lost, but my vision of the future
came true...
DP.549.1665:
You’re going to win again!
That’s the future I saw!\f
DP.549.1666:
Right after this, you will send out
Pokémon to battle me!\f
DP.549.1667:
Right after this, I have to pay
out your prize money...
DP.549.1668:
What will happen to you after this?
Why don’t you do just as you like?\r
It would be more fun that way.
DP.549.1669:
Right after this, you will hurl a Poké
Ball in an astonishingly cool way!\f
DP.549.1670:
My quest for power brought me here.\f
It was beneath the desert sand that
I toughened my body and soul.\f
Accept my challenge! Uraah!\f
DP.549.1672:
I thought I couldn’t win before it
became a fact...\f
I’ve let down my Pokémon...\f
They go to battle with faith in
their Trainer...
DP.549.1673:
This time! This time I will win!
My spirit is renewed and strong!\f
DP.549.1674:
I have meditated under a waterfall
to temper my spirit.\f
Allow me to demonstrate its strength!\f
DP.549.1676:
All that time under the waterfall...
Seems I’ve caught a cold.
DP.549.1677:
Since the day I lost to you, I’ve
meditated under a waterfall!\f
DP.549.1678:
People! Nature! Pokémon!
Harmony is essential!\f
DP.549.1680:
Protecting Pokémon and nature.
Think of what that means.
DP.549.1681:
Do you remember my slogan?
People! Nature! Pokémon!\f
That’s right, harmony is essential!\f
DP.549.1682:
I work to protect beautiful, natural
environments.\f
My Pokémon are my constant
companions while I work.\f
DP.549.1683:
Oh, my gosh!
My poor Pokémon!
DP.549.1684:
Everyone can do their part to keep
nature clean. It doesn’t take much.
DP.549.1685:
I’m on patrol in pristine nature
with my Pokémon like usual.\f
Come to think of it, you’re always
with Pokémon, too.\f
DP.549.1686:
We go on patrol to make sure there’s
nothing strange going on.\f
And occasionally, we battle!\f
DP.549.1688:
You know that Pokémon ability Pickup?\f
I think that’s a good way of keeping
the environment clean of litter.
DP.549.1689:
Patrols day in and day out!
And the occasional battle!\f
DP.549.1690:
In the embrace of Mother Nature,
people and Pokémon grow strong!\f
DP.549.1692:
You can grow strong anywhere.
It doesn’t matter where you are.
DP.549.1693:
By battling tough opponents, both
Trainers and Pokémon grow tough!\f
DP.549.1694:
We’ve grown strong together in
nature and in the concrete jungle.\f
We make everywhere we go our
playground!\f
DP.549.1696:
Look around you at this wildly
contorted terrain.\f
It’s no wonder that Pokémon would
grow tough in a place like this.
DP.549.1697:
I think I’m pretty tough, but so
are you and your Pokémon.\f
Let’s have a battle to see who
is the toughest!\f
DP.549.1698:
Are you getting worn out from all
the running you’ve done?\f
DP.549.1700:
The world is full of Pokémon and all
sorts of Trainers.
DP.549.1701:
What do you think of the Battle
Zone?\f
You’ve met so many Pokémon...
I’ve got to battle you again!\f
DP.549.1702:
A Trainer riding a Pokémon!
I like that! We’ve gotta battle!\f
DP.549.1703:
Awesome!
You’re a real wild child!
DP.549.1704:
Riding the waves on a Pokémon’s
back...\f
Yeah, that’s something to talk
about, all right.
DP.549.1705:
Yo, Pokémon-riding Trainer!
How about a rematch?\f
DP.549.1706:
Check out my physique! The rough
seas sculpted this awesome body!\f
DP.549.1707:
Muscles I have plenty of...
But let’s not talk about power.
DP.549.1708:
You’ve got your Pokémon using
a hidden move for you...\f
I find that really moving.
DP.549.1709:
The rough seas here almost
drowned...\f
Wait, no, shaped my physique!
See how buff it is!\f
DP.549.1710:
Check out my dynamic form!
Victory is assured!\f
DP.549.1712:
Being a good swimmer doesn’t make
me any better as a Trainer...
DP.549.1713:
Hi! You’re that kid who’s great with
Pokémon!\f
I’ll battle with an even more dynamic
form than before! Watch me now!\f
DP.549.1714:
Me and my Pokémon are pumped up
and ready to go all out!\f
DP.549.1716:
Overwhelm with our dazzling physiques!
That was our game plan...
DP.549.1717:
Me and my Pokémon are pumped up!
See, our muscles are twitching!\f
DP.549.1718:
People keep coming to us for battles.
I really don’t know why! Teehee!\f
DP.549.1720:
I wanted to be alone, but swatting
away immature boys on the prowl...\f
Well, my Pokémon grew tough without
me really even trying.
